此公告的核心是Nemotron 3 Super的發布，這是一款複雜的、專注於推理的模型，旨在為自主企業代理提供支援。該模型擁有1200億個總參數和120億個活動參數，採用混合架構，結合了Mamba序列建模和Mixture-of-Experts路由。與許多競爭對手的閉門造車方式不同，Nvidia以開源權重、數據集和訓練配方發布了Nemotron 3 Super，允許開發者修改並在其自有基礎設施上部署該系統。公司領導層強調，這種透明度對於在網絡安全和金融服務等敏感領域建立信任至關重要。[ref:3]

行業分析人士將此舉描述為一項積極的「生態系統遊戲」，旨在捍衛和擴大公司的主導地位。儘管Nvidia目前控制著數據中心GPU市場約86%的份額，但競爭對手和客戶越來越尋求開發自己的芯片。通過提供專為其CUDA軟件堆棧優化的、高質量的開源權重模型，Nvidia旨在增加開發者的「轉換成本」，並確保其硬體保持行業標準。財務預測顯示，如果Nvidia能夠佔據基礎模型市場的10%，該計劃在未來三年內可能產生額外500億美元的年收入。[ref:7]

投資策略包括在未來18至24個月內快速增加支出，重點是人才招聘和計算基礎設施。雖然Nemotron 3 Super是該新計劃下的首個主要發布，但Nvidia預計將從2026年末開始推出更廣泛的自主研發前沿模型。該時間表與公司即將推出的Rubin和Vera GPU架構一致，後者旨在提供每瓦40%更高的能效。通過緊密集成這些下一代芯片與專用的開源軟件，Nvidia正試圖在邁向代理式AI的競賽中建立不可逾越的領先優勢。[ref:7]

科技界的反應大多是積極的，開源開發的支持者讚揚了這一舉措，認為這是對專有AI「圍牆花園」的必要抗衡。然而，一些市場觀察人士警告說，該策略並非沒有風險。通過進入軟件和模型領域，Nvidia冒著疏遠其主要買家的風險，他們可能會加速尋找替代硬體解決方案的努力。儘管存在這些擔憂，Nvidia仍然是世界上最有價值的公司，市值達4.5萬億美元，其260億美元的賭注表明其堅信人工智能的未來將建立在開放、可訪問和可定制的框架之上。

timeline.title: Nvidia Commits Twenty-Six Billion Dollars to Open-Weight AI Models in Strategic Pivot
timeline.title_zh: Nvidia 承諾斥資260億美元用於專有開放權重 AI 模型，進行戰略轉型
timeline.sub_title: The massive five-year investment signals Nvidia's transformation from a hardware supplier to a full-stack AI laboratory, directly challenging industry leaders like OpenAI while fortifying its dominant CUDA software ecosystem.
timeline.sub_title_zh: Nvidia 透過財政文件披露，其五年投資計劃目標是開發 Nemotron 3 Super 等高性能模型，以挑戰專有實驗室及全球開源競爭對手。
timeline.summary:
On March 12, 2026, Nvidia officially disclosed a landmark strategic shift, committing $26 billion over the next five years to the development of proprietary open-weight artificial intelligence models. The announcement, first detailed in a financial filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and subsequently confirmed by company executives, marks the most significant evolution in Nvidia's history. By moving beyond its role as a primary provider of GPU infrastructure, the company is positioning itself as a full-stack top-tier AI laboratory, capable of designing the intelligence layer that runs on its world-leading silicon.

The core of this strategy involves the release of open-weight models, where Nvidia publishes the underlying parameters of its neural networks while maintaining control over the specific training code and data. This [ref:6] middle path is designed to provide developers, researchers, and enterprises with the flexibility to download, modify, and deploy powerful models on their own private infrastructure. This [ref:5] move is widely seen as a defensive maneuver to protect the CUDA moat—Nvidia’s proprietary software ecosystem. By ensuring that the world’s most advanced open models are natively optimized for Nvidia hardware, the company aims to lock developers into its architecture even as competitors like AMD and Intel gain ground with hardware-agnostic compilers.

The $26 billion commitment—a sum roughly eight times the estimated cost of training OpenAI’s GPT-4—puts Nvidia in direct competition with its largest customers, including OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google. As these frontier labs increasingly focus on closed-source proprietary systems, Nvidia is stepping into the void to provide a high-performance Western alternative to the rising dominance of Chinese open-source models from firms like DeepSeek and Alibaba. Industry insiders suggest this pivot transforms the relationship between Nvidia and its clients from a symbiotic partnership to a complex co-opetition, where the hardware supplier now offers a superior software product.

Coinciding with the investment disclosure, Nvidia released its flagship model, Nemotron 3 Super. This model, featuring 128 billion total parameters and 12 billion active parameters via a Mixture-of-Experts architecture, reportedly outperforms OpenAI's GPT-OSS in recent benchmarks. Nemotron 3 Super is specifically engineered for agentic AI workloads, such as autonomous software development and complex cybersecurity triaging. Nvidia claims that these multi-agent systems can generate up to 15 times more tokens than standard chat interactions, driving even greater demand for the company’s underlying compute power.

The implementation of the $26 billion fund will occur incrementally over the next 18 to 24 months, with a broader suite of self-developed models expected to reach the market by late 2026. Financial analysts project that if Nvidia can capture just 10% of the foundational AI model market while maintaining its 80% share of the GPU market, the strategy could generate an additional $50 billion in annual revenue within three years. To support this vision, Nvidia also announced a $2 billion investment in AI cloud provider Nebius Group and a global partnership with NTT DATA to build AI factories, ensuring that its new models have a robust, standardized environment for enterprise deployment.
timeline.summary_zh:
Nvidia 已正式從硬體基礎設施提供商轉型為頂級人工智能實驗室，宣佈在未來五年內進行260億美元的巨額投資。這項戰略轉變，在最近提交給美國證券交易委員會的財務文件中披露，代表了迄今為止對開放權重 AI 開發的最大單一企業承諾之一。透過投入數百億美元於高性能模型的開發，Nvidia 旨在確保其硬體仍是業界的預設平台，同時為國際競爭對手的新興開源模型提供一個強大、由美國開發的對抗力量。

該計劃的核心是推出 Nemotron 3 Super，這是一個複雜的1200億參數模型，專為複雜、多步驟的「代理式」AI 任務而設計。該模型採用了一種新穎的混合架構，結合了狀態空間 Mamba 層與傳統 Transformer 層，與先前版本相比，自動化代理工作流程的吞吐量提高了五倍。透過採用一種「混合專家」方法，該方法在任何給定時間僅啟用120億參數，Nvidia 已優化了該模型的高效率推理能力，使其成為 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 等專有系統的直接競爭對手。

除了 Nemotron 3 Super，Nvidia 的內部研究團隊據稱已完成了個龐大的5500億參數模型的預訓練。這個超大型模型作為對該公司不斷發展的開放權重生態系統的技術壓力測試。Nvidia 的領導層，包括應用深度學習研究副總裁 Bryan Catanzaro，已將此舉描述為一種「中間路徑」策略。透過發佈模型權重，同時保持特定訓練數據和程式碼的專有性，Nvidia 允許企業在自己的私有基礎設施上下載、微調和運行高級 AI，從而滿足企業對數據隱私和成本控制的關鍵需求。[ref:2, 1]

這種積極擴張到模型層的舉動，被視為對國際 AI 實驗室日益增長的影響力的一種防禦和進攻策略，這些實驗室已憑藉高品質的開源發佈贏得了大量市場份額。Nvidia 旨在從頭開始定義模型層的技術標準，以鞏固其生態系統的主導地位。預計這260億美元的注資將在未來18至24個月內逐步部署，並計劃在2027年前發佈更廣泛的自研開源模型套件。

市場反應顯著，例如合作夥伴 Perplexity 已將 Nemotron 3 Super 整合到其自動化代理平台中。分析師認為，這種全堆疊方法——同時擁有晶片和智慧——可能從根本上重塑競爭格局。隨著 Nvidia 構建其「NemoClaw」代理平台並深化其軟體堆疊，該公司正在有效地演變成一個主要的軟體競爭對手，不再僅滿足於為全球 AI 行業提供底層硬體。

stories.title: Nvidia’s Twenty-Six Billion Dollar Open-Weight AI Investment Signals Massive Vertical Integration Strategy
stories.title_zh: Nvidia 斥資260億美元投資開放權重AI模型，預示大規模垂直整合策略
stories.sub_title: Disclosing a massive five-year commitment, Nvidia releases the Nemotron 3 Super model and readies a 550-billion parameter successor, signaling a pivot toward full-stack competition with industry giants.
stories.sub_title_zh: Nvidia披露了長達五年的巨額承諾，發布Nemotron 3 Super模型並準備推出一個擁有5500億參數的後繼模型，標誌著公司將轉向與行業巨頭進行全棧競爭。
stories.summary:
Nvidia has officially embarked on a transformative five-year strategy, committing $26 billion to the development of proprietary open-weight artificial intelligence models. This massive capital injection, first detailed in recent financial filings and confirmed by senior executives, represents the most aggressive move toward vertical integration in the company's history. By transitioning from a primary supplier of high-performance GPUs to a developer of foundational AI models, Nvidia is effectively entering direct competition with its largest customers, including OpenAI, Anthropic, and the major hyperscale cloud providers. Industry analysts are likening this maneuver to the launch of the CUDA platform nearly two decades ago, aiming to create a software ecosystem that makes switching to rival hardware virtually impossible for developers.

The first tangible result of this investment surfaced this week with the release of Nemotron 3 Super, a 120-billion-parameter open-weight model. Specifically optimized for autonomous AI agents, Nemotron 3 Super is designed to handle complex enterprise workflows and supports massive context windows for processing large datasets. Beyond this initial release, Nvidia’s Vice President of Applied Deep Learning Research has confirmed that the company has already completed the pretraining of a significantly larger 550-billion-parameter model. This rapid product cadence suggests that Nvidia intends to saturate the open-weight market with high-performance alternatives that are natively tuned for its upcoming Blackwell and Vera Rubin chip architectures.

Strategic experts suggest that the $26 billion investment serves as a defensive moat against the rising threat of hardware-agnostic compilers and competing chips from AMD and Intel. While AMD’s latest hardware has shown impressive gains in inference efficiency, Nvidia’s strategy is to ensure that the most popular and capable open-weight models are those that run best on its own silicon. By providing these models for free or under open-weight licenses, Nvidia forces the industry to standardize around its software stack, thereby maintaining its 80 percent-plus market share in the data center segment despite intensifying competition.

Market reactions to the announcement have been swift, with investors closely watching how Nvidia’s relationship with its primary cloud customers evolves. In a related development on Saturday, news emerged of a $2 billion investment into the neocloud infrastructure provider Nebius Group. This move is seen as a way to accelerate the deployment of dedicated AI data centers that will specifically host Nvidia’s new model ecosystem. By funding specialized infrastructure partners, Nvidia is bypassing traditional gatekeepers and ensuring that its new software and hardware stacks are accessible to a global developer base.

Looking ahead, the industry’s attention is now fixed on the upcoming GTC 2026 conference scheduled to begin on Monday. Analysts expect CEO Jensen Huang to provide more granular details on the five-layer AI stack—energy, chips, infrastructure, models, and applications—that now forms the core of Nvidia’s corporate identity. With the $26 billion commitment as a backdrop, the conference is anticipated to showcase how Nvidia will leverage its new models to drive demand for the next generation of Vera Rubin chips, which are expected to significantly lower the costs of AI inference for enterprises worldwide.
stories.summary_zh:
Nvidia已正式啟動一項變革性的五年策略，承諾斥資260億美元開發專有的開放權重人工智慧模型。這筆巨額資金注入，最早在近期財務報表中詳細披露並得到高管確認，代表了該公司歷史上最積極的垂直整合舉動。通過從高性能GPU的主要供應商轉變為基礎AI模型的開發者，Nvidia有效地進入了與其最大客戶（包括OpenAI、Anthropic以及主要的超大規模雲端供應商）的直接競爭。行業分析人士將這一舉動比作近二十年前CUDA平台的推出，旨在創建一個軟體生態系統，使開發者幾乎不可能轉向競爭對手的硬體。

這項投資的第一個實質性成果出現在本週，推出了Nemotron 3 Super，這是一個擁有1200億參數的開放權重模型。Nemotron 3 Super專門針對自主AI代理進行了優化，旨在處理複雜的企業工作流程，並支援用於處理大型資料集的大型上下文窗口。除了這次初步發布外，Nvidia應用深度學習研究副總裁已確認，該公司已完成了一個參數量大得多的5500億參數模型的預訓練。這種快速的產品發布節奏表明，Nvidia打算用高性能的替代品來充斥開放權重市場，這些替代品將與其即將推出的Blackwell和Vera Rubin晶片架構原生調優。

戰略專家認為，這260億美元的投資是對抗硬體不可知編譯器以及AMD和Intel等競爭對手晶片的日益威脅的一道防線。儘管AMD的最新硬體在推斷效率方面取得了令人矚目的進展，但Nvidia的策略是確保最受歡迎和最有能力的模型是那些在其自有矽晶片上運行效果最好的模型。通過免費或以開放權重授權提供這些模型，Nvidia迫使業界標準化其軟體堆疊，從而保持其在資料中心領域80%以上的市場份額，儘管競爭日益激烈。

市場對此公告的反應迅速，投資者密切關注Nvidia與其主要雲端客戶的關係如何演變。在週六的一項相關發展中，有消息傳出向neocloud基礎設施提供商Nebius Group投資20億美元。此舉被視為加速部署專用AI資料中心的方式，這些資料中心將專門託管Nvidia的新模型生態系統。通過資助專門的基礎設施合作夥伴，Nvidia繞過了傳統的守門人，確保其新的軟體和硬體堆疊能夠被全球開發者群體所使用。

展望未來，行業的注意力現已轉向即將於週一開始的GTC 2026大會。分析人士預計，CEO黃仁勳將提供有關構成Nvidia企業身份核心的五層AI堆疊——能源、晶片、基礎設施、模型和應用程式——的更多細節。在260億美元承諾的背景下，預計此次會議將展示Nvidia將如何利用其新模型來推動下一代Vera Rubin晶片的銷售，預計這些晶片將顯著降低企業的AI推斷成本。

stories.label: Ukraine launches long-range missile strikes on Russian territory causing casualties and injuries
stories.label_zh: 烏克蘭對俄羅斯領土發動遠程導彈襲擊，造成傷亡

timeline.title: Ukraine Strikes Russian Ports and Refineries as Massive Missile Exchanges Escalate Across Regional Borders
timeline.title_zh: 烏克蘭襲擊俄羅斯港口和煉油廠，大規模導彈交換在地區邊境升級
timeline.sub_title: Ukrainian long-range operations hit strategic energy and logistics hubs in Krasnodar while Moscow retaliates with a massive 500-weapon aerial assault targeting Kyiv and other key regions.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 烏克蘭的遠程行動襲擊了克拉斯諾達爾的戰略能源和物流樞紐，而莫斯科則以針對基輔和其他關鍵地區的 500 件大規模空中襲擊進行報復。
timeline.summary:
The conflict between Russia and Ukraine reached a new level of intensity on March 14, 2026, as Ukrainian forces executed a series of long-range strikes against high-value strategic targets deep within Russian territory and occupied regions. The most significant of these operations targeted the Krasnodar Krai region, where Ukrainian deep-strike units successfully hit the Port Kavkaz and the Afipsky oil refinery. Russian authorities confirmed that at least three people were injured during the attack on Port Kavkaz, a critical maritime logistics hub located on the Kerch Strait. The strike reportedly damaged pier infrastructure and a service vessel, with one individual requiring hospitalization. [ref:3] Simultaneously, drone debris at the Afipsky oil refinery—one of the largest in southern Russia—sparked a significant fire, though no immediate casualties were reported at that facility.

In tandem with the Krasnodar strikes, Ukrainian Special Operations Forces deployed long-range drones to target Russian missile systems in occupied Crimea. Reports indicate that at least one Iskander-M operational-tactical missile launcher was destroyed near the village of Vyshneve while it was loaded and prepared for a launch. Footage released by the Ukrainian military showed secondary detonations, suggesting a direct hit on the ammunition. Additionally, a hangar in the settlement of Kurortne, believed to be used for storing further missile hardware, was also struck. These [ref:2] operations are part of a broader Ukrainian campaign aimed at degrading Russia’s ability to conduct its own missile strikes against Ukrainian cities.

In a massive retaliatory response, Russia launched one of its largest coordinated aerial assaults of the year overnight and throughout Saturday. According to Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, Russian forces deployed approximately 430 attack drones and 68 missiles of various types, including Zircon anti-ship missiles and Iskander-M ballistics. The primary target was the energy infrastructure surrounding the capital, Kyiv, though strikes were also recorded in the Sumy, Zaporizhzhia, and Kharkiv regions. The assault [ref:5, 1] resulted in at least five deaths and dozens of injuries across Ukraine, causing widespread power outages and significant damage to residential buildings and schools.

This escalation comes amid a heated diplomatic row between the Kremlin and Western powers. On March 13 and 14, the Russian Ministry of Foreign Affairs summoned the ambassadors of the United Kingdom and France to lodge a formal protest regarding the use of Western-supplied long-range weapons in strikes on Russian soil, specifically citing a previous attack in the Bryansk region that killed seven people. Moscow has accused NATO specialists of providing the direct intelligence and technical support necessary for such precision strikes, warning of a 'fundamentally new level' of destruction if such operations continue. As international attention remains divided by ongoing conflicts in the Middle East, both Moscow and Kyiv appear to be intensifying their deep-strike capabilities in a bid to seize the strategic initiative.
timeline.summary_zh:
2026 年 3 月 14 日，隨著烏克蘭部隊在俄羅斯境內和佔領區深處針對高價值戰略目標發動一系列遠程襲擊，俄羅斯與烏克蘭之間的衝突達到了新的激烈程度。其中最重大的行動目標是克拉斯諾達爾邊疆區，烏克蘭深遠打擊部隊成功襲擊了 Port Kavkaz 和 Afipsky 石油煉油廠。俄羅斯當局證實，Port Kavkaz 襲擊事件中至少有三人受傷，該港口是刻赤海峽重要的海上物流樞紐。據報導，襲擊損壞了碼頭基礎設施和一艘服務船，其中一人需住院治療。同時，Afipsky 石油煉油廠（俄羅斯南部最大的煉油廠之一）的無人機殘骸引發了大火，但該設施沒有立即報告人員傷亡。[ref:3]

與克拉斯諾達爾的襲擊同步，烏克蘭特種作戰部隊動用遠程無人機攻擊了克里米亞佔領區的俄羅斯導彈系統。據報導，至少有一枚 Iskander-M 戰術導彈發射器在 Vyshneve 村附近被摧毀，當時該導彈正在裝載並準備發射。烏克蘭軍方發布的畫面顯示了二次爆炸，表明導彈彈藥受到直接命中。此外，位於 Kurortne 村莊的一個據信用於儲存更多導彈硬體機庫也遭到襲擊。這些行動是烏克蘭旨在削弱俄羅斯對烏克蘭城市進行導彈襲擊能力的更廣泛行動的一部分。[ref:2]

作為大規模報復回應，俄羅斯在週五夜間和整個週六發動了今年最大規模的協調空中襲擊之一。據烏克蘭總統澤連斯基稱，俄羅斯軍隊部署了約 430 架無人機和 68 枚各類導彈，包括 Zircon 反艦導彈和 Iskander-M 彈道導彈。主要目標是基輔首都周邊的能源基礎設施，但在蘇梅、扎波羅熱和哈爾科夫地區也記錄了襲擊。這次襲擊導致烏克蘭各地至少五人死亡，數十人受傷，造成大範圍停電以及住宅樓和學校的嚴重損壞。[ref:5, 1]

此次升級發生在克里姆林宮與西方國家之間緊張的外交爭執之中。3 月 13 日和 14 日，俄羅斯外交部傳喚了英國和法國大使，就使用西方供應的遠程武器襲擊俄羅斯領土提出正式抗議，特別是提到了此前在布良斯克地區造成七人死亡的襲擊事件。莫斯科指責北約專家提供了此類精確打擊所需的直接情報和技術支持，並警告如果這類行動持續下去，將會達到 '根本上新的' 毀滅水平。隨著國際注意力因中東地區的持續衝突而分散，莫斯科和基輔似乎都在加緊其深遠打擊能力，以爭奪戰略主動權。[ref:null]

timeline.title: Moscow Summons Western Ambassadors Following Deadly Ukrainian Missile Strikes on Strategic Russian Infrastructure
timeline.title_zh: 莫斯科就烏克蘭襲擊俄羅斯戰略基礎設施事件傳召西方大使
timeline.sub_title: Russia issued a formal diplomatic protest to the United Kingdom and France after Storm Shadow missiles struck Bryansk, causing dozens of casualties and targeting key microelectronic and energy facilities.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 風暴陰影導彈襲擊了布良斯克，造成數十人傷亡並針對關鍵的微電子和能源設施，俄羅斯向英國和法國發出了正式外交抗議。
timeline.summary:
The Kremlin significantly escalated its diplomatic rhetoric on Friday, March 13, 2026, by summoning the ambassadors of the United Kingdom and France to the Foreign Ministry in Moscow. The summons was issued as a formal protest against the alleged involvement of Western specialists in a deadly Ukrainian missile strike on the Russian city of Bryansk earlier this week. [ref:5, 4, 1] Russian officials claim that the attack, which utilized sophisticated Storm Shadow long-range missiles, resulted in at least seven deaths and left more than 40 others injured, including children. [ref:2] The strike targeted a busy commercial area near the Bryansk State Engineering and Technology University and the Kremniy El microchip plant, one of Russia’s largest manufacturers of microelectronics for military use.

Ukrainian officials have acknowledged responsibility for the Bryansk operation, characterizing it as a justified response to ongoing Russian aggression and a necessary measure to degrade the industrial base supporting Moscow's war effort. President Volodymyr Zelensky defended the use of long-range capabilities, stating that hitting the sources of Russian missile production is essential for protecting Ukrainian civilians. This exchange highlights the deepening involvement of Western-supplied precision weaponry in strikes far behind the established front lines, a development that Moscow has labeled as a deliberate provocation and an act of state-sponsored terrorism.

Parallel to the diplomatic fallout, Ukraine’s deep-strike campaign continued to intensify within the past 24 hours. Overnight between March 12 and March 13, a wave of Ukrainian drones successfully targeted the Tikhoretsk oil depot in the Krasnodar Krai region. Satellite [ref:3] imagery and local reports confirmed that at least two large fuel storage tanks were destroyed in the attack, sparking massive fires at what is considered one of the most critical oil transshipment hubs in southern Russia. This strike [ref:3] follows a reported massive fire at a metallurgy plant in the Tula Oblast, further signaling a coordinated effort by Kyiv to paralyze Russian logistics and energy infrastructure.

The increasing frequency and success of these operations are partly attributed to the maturation of Ukraine’s domestic long-range programs. Reports indicate that the newly developed 'Flamingo' cruise missile, with a range exceeding 1,000 kilometers, is now being regularly integrated into strike packages alongside Western systems. These domestic assets allow Ukraine to circumvent some of the restrictive conditions previously placed on the use of foreign weapons for strikes inside Russian territory. By combining indigenous cruise missiles with high-endurance drones, Ukrainian forces have forced Russia to relocate air defense assets from the front lines to protect internal industrial centers.

The situation remains highly volatile as the international community watches for a potential Russian retaliation. The Russian Foreign Ministry warned that if European capitals continue to facilitate these strikes, they will bear full responsibility for the 'destructive consequences' and any further escalation of the conflict. Meanwhile, Kyiv [ref:5, 1] appears committed to expanding its strategic reach, with defense officials hinting at upcoming operations targeting even more distant production facilities. As the war of attrition moves deeper into the Russian interior, the risk of a direct confrontation between NATO powers and Russia continues to mount.
timeline.summary_zh:
克里姆林宮於 2026 年 3 月 13 日星期五大幅升級了其外交言辭，傳召英國和法國大使到莫斯科外交部。傳召是針對烏克蘭本週早些時候對俄羅斯城市布良斯克發動的致命導彈襲擊，據稱西方專家參與其中，發出了正式抗議。俄羅斯官員聲稱，此次襲擊使用了先進的風暴陰影遠程導彈，造成至少七人死亡，四十多人受傷，其中包括兒童。襲擊目標是布良斯克國立工程技術大學和俄羅斯最大的微電子產品製造商之一克里姆尼埃爾（Kremniy El）微芯片廠附近的一個繁忙商業區。[ref:5, 4, 1, 2]

烏克蘭官員已承認對布良斯克行動負責，認為這是對持續的俄羅斯侵略的合理回應，也是削弱莫斯科戰爭支援工業基礎的必要措施。總統沃洛德米爾·澤倫斯基（Volodymyr Zelensky）捍衛了遠程能力的使用，表示打擊俄羅斯導彈生產的來源對於保護烏克蘭平民至關重要。這次事件凸顯了西方供應的精確武器越來越深入地參與到遠離既定前線的襲擊中，莫斯科已將此舉標籤為蓄意挑釁和國家贊助的恐怖主義行為。

與外交影響同時發生的是，烏克蘭的遠程打擊行動在過去 24 小時內持續加劇。在 3 月 12 日至 13 日的夜間，一批烏克蘭無人機成功襲擊了克拉斯諾達爾邊疆區的季霍列茨克（Tikhoretsk）石油儲備庫。衛星圖像和當地報告證實，襲擊中至少有兩個大型燃料儲存罐被摧毀，引發了當時被認為是俄羅斯南部最關鍵的石油轉運樞紐之一的大火。此次襲擊發生在圖拉州一家冶金廠發生大規模火災之後，進一步表明基輔正在採取協調一致的行動，以癱瘓俄羅斯的物流和能源基礎設施。[ref:3]

這些行動日益頻繁且成功，部分歸因於烏克蘭國內遠程計劃的成熟。報告顯示，新開發的「火烈鳥」（Flamingo）巡航導彈，射程超過 1000 公里，現已與西方系統一同被定期整合到打擊編隊中。這些國內資產使烏克蘭能夠繞過先前對使用外國武器襲擊俄羅斯領土內部施加的一些限制條件。通過結合國產巡航導彈和高續航力無人機，烏克蘭軍隊迫使俄羅斯將防空資產從前線轉移，以保護其國內工業中心。

局勢依然極不穩定，國際社會正密切關注俄羅斯的潛在報復行動。俄羅斯外交部警告說，如果歐洲各國首都繼續縱容這些襲擊，他們將對「破壞性後果」及衝突的任何進一步升級承擔全部責任。同時，基輔似乎決心擴大其戰略打擊範圍，國防官員暗示即將進行針對更遠生產設施的行動。隨著消耗戰深入俄羅斯腹地，北約國家與俄羅斯之間發生直接對抗的風險持續增加。[ref:5, 1]

timeline.title: Ukraine Intensifies Long-Range Missile Strikes on Russian Industrial and Energy Hubs, Inflicting Heavy Casualties
timeline.title_zh: 烏克蘭「風暴陰影」導彈襲擊俄羅斯戰略微芯片廠，造成七死數十傷
timeline.sub_title: Kyiv deployed Storm Shadow missiles to devastate a critical microelectronics plant in Bryansk and launched drone strikes on a major Krasnodar oil hub, marking a strategic escalation.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 一枚高精度遠程導彈襲擊布良斯克「克列姆尼伊·埃爾」工廠，引發俄羅斯重大傷亡，並促使莫斯科威脅軍事升級。
timeline.summary:
Ukrainian forces have significantly intensified their deep-strike campaign within Russian territory, executing a high-precision missile attack on the Kremniy El microelectronics factory in Bryansk. The operation, which utilized British-supplied Storm Shadow cruise missiles launched from modified Su-24M fighters, targeted one of Russia’s most critical semiconductor producers. This facility is a vital link in the Kremlin's defense industrial base, manufacturing essential components and microchips for advanced weaponry, including Iskander and Kh-series cruise missiles. Ukrainian military officials confirmed that the strike achieved significant damage to production workshops, with analysts suggesting the destruction could cripple Russia’s ability to replenish its precision-guided munition stockpiles for months.

The human toll of the Bryansk strike has become clearer over the last 24 hours as rescue operations continue. Russian regional authorities confirmed that the death toll has risen to seven following the discovery of additional victims in the debris. Furthermore, at least 42 individuals were reported injured, some critically, with the total number of casualties reaching nearly 50. Social media footage and satellite imagery from the scene show extensive damage to the industrial complex and nearby civilian areas, including apartment buildings. Ukrainian intelligence indicated that the strike's effectiveness was bolstered by the use of real-time drone surveillance for fire correction, a tactical evolution that allowed for maximum impact with a limited number of cruise missiles.

The Kremlin has reacted with sharp condemnation, characterizing the assault as an act of terrorism intended to derail potential peace negotiations. Spokesman Dmitry Peskov explicitly linked the success of the operation to Western assistance, asserting that the deployment of Storm Shadow missiles would not have been possible without the direct involvement of British technical specialists. Moscow has used this development to reinforce its narrative for the ongoing military campaign, claiming that the "demilitarization" of Ukraine is an absolute necessity to prevent future strikes on Russian soil. Russian Foreign [ref:2] Ministry officials further accused London of being a full party to the conflict and escalating the war to a more lethal level.

Simultaneous with the missile strikes in the west, Ukrainian security services launched a massive drone offensive against energy infrastructure in southern Russia. A major strike on the Tikhoretsk oil pumping station in Krasnodar Krai resulted in massive fires that burned throughout the day. The Tikhoretsk hub serves as a vital logistics artery for the transport of petroleum products to the port of Novorossiysk. Ukrainian Security [ref:1] Service sources described the operation as a significant blow to Russian fuel logistics, aimed at disrupting the supply chains that sustain frontline forces while limiting the Kremlin’s oil export revenues.

This escalation comes as Ukraine secures further international commitments for its autonomous strike capabilities. President Volodymyr Zelensky announced a strategic partnership with Romania to co-produce drones, following a similar move by German partners to deliver advanced air defense interceptors. Kyiv’s strategy now focuses on a multi-layered approach: protecting its own skies while projecting power deep into Russian territory to systematically degrade the enemy's military-economic potential. The use of sophisticated Western hardware for high-impact strikes inside Russia represents a definitive new phase of the conflict, as both sides brace for further intensification of the aerial campaign.
timeline.summary_zh:
烏克蘭部隊已加劇其在俄羅斯境內的遠程襲擊行動，成功鎖定布良斯克市一家關鍵的微電子工廠。此次襲擊發生於3月10日，在過去24小時內被廣泛報導，使用了英國提供的「風暴陰影」巡航導彈摧毀了「克列姆尼伊·埃爾」工廠。該設施是俄羅斯最大的軍用級微芯片和半導體元件生產商之一，這些元件對俄羅斯經常用於襲擊烏克蘭城市中心的導彈的制導系統至關重要。衛星圖像證實，至少有五枚導彈擊中主要生產樓，造成毀滅性損壞及次生爆炸，燃燒了數小時。[ref:1, 2]

據俄羅斯外交部稱，此次精準打擊造成重大平民傷亡，當地官員報告稱，員工和附近居民中有七人死亡，四十二人受傷。儘管烏克蘭官員尚未證實具體的傷亡數字，但烏克蘭總參謀部將此次行動定性為成功削弱了俄羅斯的國防工業基礎。值得注意的是，此次任務標誌著烏克蘭無人系統部隊的戰術演進，他們部署了一架專門的無人機來提供實時火力修正。這使得導彈操作員能夠在飛行中調整目標數據，確保以相對較少的彈藥對工廠的生產基礎設施產生最大影響。[ref:1]

克里姆林宮對此事件的反應是強烈譴責，並警告將對西方國家採取直接升級行動。俄羅斯外交部長謝爾蓋·拉夫羅夫及外交部發言人聲稱，若沒有北約人員直接參與目標設定和飛行規劃，就不可能使用「風暴陰影」導彈。莫斯科將此次事件描述為進入衝突一個根本上更危險的階段，並威脅將採取可能涉及新一級別破壞的對策。儘管有這些威脅，俄羅斯極端民族主義軍事博主批評國防部未能保護如此深處俄羅斯領空的戰略資產。

除了布良斯克襲擊外，烏克蘭還在邊境地區保持高強度的空中行動。過去一天，據報導索契發生了大規模的24小時無人機襲擊，目標是能源基礎設施和後勤樞紐。俄羅斯防空部隊聲稱在多個地區攔截了185架無人機，包括被佔領的克里米亞和黑海。與此同時，有報導稱對與主要黑海天然氣管道相關的壓縮站進行了襲擊嘗試，這表明烏克蘭正致力於同時削弱俄羅斯的軍事製造、能源出口和區域防空網絡。隨著局勢發展，焦點仍將是俄羅斯是否會兌現其報復威脅，還是會將重點轉向保護其剩餘的國防工業設施。

stories.title: Ukraine Strikes Russian Ports and Refineries as Massive Missile Exchanges Escalate Across Regional Borders
stories.title_zh: 烏克蘭襲擊俄羅斯港口和煉油廠，大規模導彈交換在地區邊境升級
stories.sub_title: Ukrainian long-range operations hit strategic energy and logistics hubs in Krasnodar while Moscow retaliates with a massive 500-weapon aerial assault targeting Kyiv and other key regions.
stories.sub_title_zh: 烏克蘭的遠程行動襲擊了克拉斯諾達爾的戰略能源和物流樞紐，而莫斯科則以針對基輔和其他關鍵地區的 500 件大規模空中襲擊進行報復。
stories.summary:
The conflict between Russia and Ukraine reached a new level of intensity on March 14, 2026, as Ukrainian forces executed a series of long-range strikes against high-value strategic targets deep within Russian territory and occupied regions. The most significant of these operations targeted the Krasnodar Krai region, where Ukrainian deep-strike units successfully hit the Port Kavkaz and the Afipsky oil refinery. Russian authorities confirmed that at least three people were injured during the attack on Port Kavkaz, a critical maritime logistics hub located on the Kerch Strait. The strike reportedly damaged pier infrastructure and a service vessel, with one individual requiring hospitalization. [ref:3] Simultaneously, drone debris at the Afipsky oil refinery—one of the largest in southern Russia—sparked a significant fire, though no immediate casualties were reported at that facility.

In tandem with the Krasnodar strikes, Ukrainian Special Operations Forces deployed long-range drones to target Russian missile systems in occupied Crimea. Reports indicate that at least one Iskander-M operational-tactical missile launcher was destroyed near the village of Vyshneve while it was loaded and prepared for a launch. Footage released by the Ukrainian military showed secondary detonations, suggesting a direct hit on the ammunition. Additionally, a hangar in the settlement of Kurortne, believed to be used for storing further missile hardware, was also struck. These [ref:2] operations are part of a broader Ukrainian campaign aimed at degrading Russia’s ability to conduct its own missile strikes against Ukrainian cities.

In a massive retaliatory response, Russia launched one of its largest coordinated aerial assaults of the year overnight and throughout Saturday. According to Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, Russian forces deployed approximately 430 attack drones and 68 missiles of various types, including Zircon anti-ship missiles and Iskander-M ballistics. The primary target was the energy infrastructure surrounding the capital, Kyiv, though strikes were also recorded in the Sumy, Zaporizhzhia, and Kharkiv regions. The assault [ref:5, 1] resulted in at least five deaths and dozens of injuries across Ukraine, causing widespread power outages and significant damage to residential buildings and schools.

This escalation comes amid a heated diplomatic row between the Kremlin and Western powers. On March 13 and 14, the Russian Ministry of Foreign Affairs summoned the ambassadors of the United Kingdom and France to lodge a formal protest regarding the use of Western-supplied long-range weapons in strikes on Russian soil, specifically citing a previous attack in the Bryansk region that killed seven people. Moscow has accused NATO specialists of providing the direct intelligence and technical support necessary for such precision strikes, warning of a 'fundamentally new level' of destruction if such operations continue. As international attention remains divided by ongoing conflicts in the Middle East, both Moscow and Kyiv appear to be intensifying their deep-strike capabilities in a bid to seize the strategic initiative.
stories.summary_zh:
2026 年 3 月 14 日，隨著烏克蘭部隊在俄羅斯境內和佔領區深處針對高價值戰略目標發動一系列遠程襲擊，俄羅斯與烏克蘭之間的衝突達到了新的激烈程度。其中最重大的行動目標是克拉斯諾達爾邊疆區，烏克蘭深遠打擊部隊成功襲擊了 Port Kavkaz 和 Afipsky 石油煉油廠。俄羅斯當局證實，Port Kavkaz 襲擊事件中至少有三人受傷，該港口是刻赤海峽重要的海上物流樞紐。據報導，襲擊損壞了碼頭基礎設施和一艘服務船，其中一人需住院治療。同時，Afipsky 石油煉油廠（俄羅斯南部最大的煉油廠之一）的無人機殘骸引發了大火，但該設施沒有立即報告人員傷亡。[ref:3]

與克拉斯諾達爾的襲擊同步，烏克蘭特種作戰部隊動用遠程無人機攻擊了克里米亞佔領區的俄羅斯導彈系統。據報導，至少有一枚 Iskander-M 戰術導彈發射器在 Vyshneve 村附近被摧毀，當時該導彈正在裝載並準備發射。烏克蘭軍方發布的畫面顯示了二次爆炸，表明導彈彈藥受到直接命中。此外，位於 Kurortne 村莊的一個據信用於儲存更多導彈硬體機庫也遭到襲擊。這些行動是烏克蘭旨在削弱俄羅斯對烏克蘭城市進行導彈襲擊能力的更廣泛行動的一部分。[ref:2]

作為大規模報復回應，俄羅斯在週五夜間和整個週六發動了今年最大規模的協調空中襲擊之一。據烏克蘭總統澤連斯基稱，俄羅斯軍隊部署了約 430 架無人機和 68 枚各類導彈，包括 Zircon 反艦導彈和 Iskander-M 彈道導彈。主要目標是基輔首都周邊的能源基礎設施，但在蘇梅、扎波羅熱和哈爾科夫地區也記錄了襲擊。這次襲擊導致烏克蘭各地至少五人死亡，數十人受傷，造成大範圍停電以及住宅樓和學校的嚴重損壞。[ref:5, 1]

此次升級發生在克里姆林宮與西方國家之間緊張的外交爭執之中。3 月 13 日和 14 日，俄羅斯外交部傳喚了英國和法國大使，就使用西方供應的遠程武器襲擊俄羅斯領土提出正式抗議，特別是提到了此前在布良斯克地區造成七人死亡的襲擊事件。莫斯科指責北約專家提供了此類精確打擊所需的直接情報和技術支持，並警告如果這類行動持續下去，將會達到 '根本上新的' 毀滅水平。隨著國際注意力因中東地區的持續衝突而分散，莫斯科和基輔似乎都在加緊其深遠打擊能力，以爭奪戰略主動權。[ref:null]

stories.label: Deadly drone strikes in Sudan and DRC highlight worsening regional humanitarian crises
stories.label_zh: 蘇丹及剛果民主共和國的致命無人機襲擊，凸顯地區人道危機惡化

timeline.title: Lethal Drone Strikes in Sudan and DRC Claim Hundreds as Regional Conflicts Enter Dangerous New Phase
timeline.title_zh: 蘇丹和剛果民主共和國致命無人機襲擊造成數百人死亡，地區衝突進入危險新階段
timeline.sub_title: Recent aerial bombardments targeting markets and residential areas have killed over 200 civilians in Sudan and a UN aid worker in Goma, further destabilizing already fragile humanitarian corridors.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 近期針對市場和住宅區的空襲已在蘇丹造成 200 多名平民死亡，並導致一名聯合國援助工作人員在戈馬喪生，進一步破壞了本已脆弱的人道走廊。
timeline.summary:
The systematic use of increasingly sophisticated combat drones has reached a catastrophic threshold in both Sudan and the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) this week. United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights, Volker Türk, expressed profound alarm on Thursday, revealing that more than 200 civilians have been killed by drone attacks in Sudan since March 4 alone. This [ref:8, 6, 4, 1, 2] surge in aerial warfare marks a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict between the Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) and the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces (RSF), as both sides increasingly rely on foreign-supplied drone technology to bypass traditional frontlines and strike deep into populated civilian hubs.

In one of the most recent atrocities, a drone strike on Thursday targeted the Adikong market near the Sudan-Chad border, killing at least 11 people and injuring more than 20 others. According [ref:5] to Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF), which treated the wounded at a nearby hospital in Adre, Chad, the strike hit a fuel market, causing massive explosions and incinerating small-scale traders and their goods. This crossing serves as a critical lifeline for humanitarian aid and medicine entering the Darfur region; its disruption threatens to isolate millions of displaced persons already on the brink of famine. 

The political fallout in Sudan has been immediate and severe. On Saturday, Sudan’s army chief and Sovereign Council head, Abdel Fattah al-Burhan, visited the village of Shukairi in White Nile State to inspect the site of a March 11 strike that killed 17 civilians, including several schoolgirls. Standing amid the ruins of a secondary school and health clinic, Burhan ruled out any possibility of coexistence or negotiation with the RSF. He described the paramilitary group’s actions as devoid of humanity and vowed to continue the military campaign until the rebellion is entirely dismantled, effectively stalling regional and international peace initiatives.

Parallel to the crisis in Sudan, the eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo has seen a similarly lethal escalation in Goma. On Wednesday, a drone strike hit the upmarket residential neighborhood of Himbi, killing Karine Buisset, a French aid worker for UNICEF. The attack, which [ref:3, 7] struck near the residence of former President Joseph Kabila, has prompted a diplomatic crisis, with the Congolese government and M23 rebels exchanging accusations of ceasefire violations. The strike occurred despite a fragile peace agreement recently brokered by international partners to enable regional stability and secure mining interests.

The humanitarian implications of these strikes are devastating. Across both regions, nearly 18 million people remain displaced, and the targeting of aid workers and vital infrastructure has made the delivery of relief nearly impossible in active combat zones. International leaders, including French President Emmanuel Macron and UN officials, have renewed their calls for all parties to respect international humanitarian law and halt the indiscriminate use of explosive weapons in urban areas. As drone warfare becomes the defining feature of these conflicts, the risk of a total regional collapse continues to grow, leaving millions of civilians caught in the crossfire of a technological arms race.
timeline.summary_zh:
本週，越來越複雜的戰鬥無人機系統性使用已在蘇丹和剛果民主共和國 (DRC) 達到了災難性的臨界點。聯合國人權事務高級專員沃爾克·特克週四表示深切憂慮，透露自 3 月 4 日以來，僅在蘇丹就有超過 200 名平民死於無人機襲擊。這次空中戰爭的激增標誌著蘇丹武裝部隊 (SAF) 和準軍事快速支援部隊 (RSF) 之間持續衝突的重大升級，雙方日益依賴外國供應的無人機技術來繞過傳統戰線，深入人口稠密的平民中心進行打擊。[ref:8, 6, 4, 1, 2]

在最近一次慘劇中，週四的一次無人機襲擊目標是蘇丹與乍得邊境附近的 Adikong 市場，造成至少 11 人死亡，20 多人受傷。據在乍得 Adre 附近醫院救治傷者的無國界醫生組織 (MSF) 稱，襲擊擊中了燃料市場，引發了大規模爆炸，並燒毀了小商販及其貨物。這個過境點是進入達爾富爾地區人道援助和藥品的重要生命線；其中斷威脅著數百萬本已瀕臨飢餓的流離失所者。[ref:5]

蘇丹的政治影響是直接而嚴重的。週六，蘇丹軍方總司令兼主權委員會主席阿卜杜勒·法塔赫·布爾漢訪問了白尼羅州 Shukairi 村，視察了 3 月 11 日造成 17 名平民（包括幾名女學生）死亡的襲擊現場。站在一所中學和一家診所的廢墟中，布爾漢排除了與 RSF 和平共存或談判的可能性。他將該準軍事組織的行為描述為沒有人性，並誓言將繼續軍事行動，直到叛亂被徹底剷除，這實際上使地區和國際和平倡議停滯不前。[ref:3, 7]

與蘇丹的危機平行，剛果民主共和國東部地區的戈馬也出現了類似致命的升級。週三，一次無人機襲擊擊中了戈馬的高檔住宅區 Himbi，造成聯合國兒童基金會的法國援助工作人員 Karine Buisset 死亡。這次襲擊發生在前總統約瑟夫·卡比拉的住所附近，引發了外交危機，剛果政府和 M23 叛軍互相指責違反停火協議。儘管國際夥伴最近促成了一項脆弱的和平協議以促進地區穩定和保護礦產資源，但襲擊仍舊發生了。[ref:null]

這些襲擊對人道主義的影響是毀滅性的。在兩個地區，近 1800 萬人仍然流離失所，援助工作人員和關鍵基礎設施的目標化使得在活躍戰區提供援助幾乎成為不可能。包括法國總統馬克龍和聯合國官員在內的國際領導人已重申他們呼籲所有各方遵守國際人道法，並停止在城市地區不分青紅皂白地使用爆炸性武器。隨著無人機戰爭成為這些衝突的決定性特徵，整個地區全面崩潰的風險持續增長，使數百萬平民陷入技術軍備競賽的槍林彈雨之中。[ref:null]

timeline.title: Drone Warfare Escalates Humanitarian Suffering as Strikes Kill Aid Workers and Civilians in Sudan and DRC
timeline.title_zh: 蘇丹與剛果民主共和國武裝無人機襲擊加劇人道災難，襲擊造成援助人員和平民死亡
timeline.sub_title: Devastating aerial attacks in Darfur and North Kivu target markets and residential areas, prompting international condemnation as the death toll from remote warfare surges across Central and East Africa.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 達爾富爾和北基伍的毀滅性空襲針對市場和住宅區，引發國際譴責，非洲中部和東部地區的遠程作戰死亡人數激增。
timeline.summary:
The escalating use of combat drones in Sudan and the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) has reached a lethal new threshold over the past 24 hours, causing mass civilian casualties and claiming the lives of humanitarian personnel. In Sudan’s West Darfur region, a devastating drone strike on Thursday targeted the Adikong border market near the Chad frontier. The [ref:5, 8, 6] attack, which hit fuel reserves, triggered massive explosions that killed at least 13 people and injured more than two dozen others. Witnesses and medical aid groups reported that the victims were primarily small-scale traders, including women and children, who were preparing for their daily work. This strike marks the second fatal aerial assault on the Adikong area in less than a month, highlighting the vulnerability of border regions that serve as lifelines for both trade and humanitarian aid.

The tragedy in Darfur follows a similarly horrific incident in Sudan’s White Nile state, where a drone strike on Wednesday hit a secondary school and a health clinic. That attack [ref:5] killed at least 17 people, many of whom were schoolgirls and a health worker. United Nations Human Rights Chief Volker Türk expressed profound alarm on Friday, noting that more than 200 civilians have been killed by drone strikes in Sudan since early March alone. Türk warned that both the Sudanese Armed Forces and the Rapid Support Forces are increasingly deploying powerful explosive weapons in densely populated areas, showing a reckless disregard for international humanitarian law.

Simultaneously, in the eastern DRC, the conflict has intensified with a drone strike on the city of Goma that has sent shockwaves through the international community. On Wednesday morning, a drone hit a residential building in the upmarket Himbi neighborhood, an area known to house many international aid workers. The strike killed three people, including a French national working for UNICEF. While the [ref:4, 7] M23 rebel group, which currently occupies Goma, blamed the Congolese military for the attack, the government in Kinshasa has stated it is investigating the origin of the explosions. The African Union and various UN agencies have condemned the strike, emphasizing that humanitarian workers and their facilities must never be targeted.

Beyond the drone strikes, violence continues to surge in the DRC's Ituri province. A brutal attack by the CODECO militia in Djugu territory killed at least 25 people, including seven children, between Wednesday and Thursday. Many of the [ref:1] victims were displaced persons who had recently returned to their villages to resume farming. This resurgence of militia violence, combined with the capture of key cities like Uvira by M23-aligned forces, has exacerbated one of the world's most protracted humanitarian emergencies.

The humanitarian toll of these twin crises is staggering. In Sudan, an estimated [ref:9] 33.7 million people now require urgent assistance, with over 12 million driven from their homes. In the DRC, internal [ref:2] displacement has surpassed 7 million people as peace efforts continue to falter. International [ref:3] observers warn that the introduction of advanced drone technology is fueling a new, more lethal phase of these conflicts, making it increasingly difficult for aid organizations to reach the millions of people caught in the crossfire.
timeline.summary_zh:
在過去 24 小時內，蘇丹和剛果民主共和國（DRC）戰鬥無人機的使用日益加劇，達到了一個致命的新閾值，造成大量平民傷亡，並導致人道主義援助人員喪生。在蘇丹西達爾富爾地區，周四的一次毀滅性無人機襲擊目標是乍得邊境附近的阿迪孔（Adikong）邊境市場。襲擊擊中了燃料儲備，引發了大規模爆炸，造成至少 13 人死亡，另有二十多人受傷。目擊者和醫療援助團體報告稱，受害者主要是小商販，包括婦女和兒童，他們當時正在為日常工作做準備。這是阿迪孔地區不到一個月內第二次發生致命的空中襲擊，凸顯了作為貿易和人道援助生命線的邊境地區的脆弱性。[ref:5, 8, 6]

達爾富爾的悲劇緊隨蘇丹白尼羅州一次類似的慘痛事件之後，當時一次無人機襲擊擊中了一所中學和一家診所。該襲擊造成至少 17 人死亡，其中許多是女學生和一名醫護人員。聯合國人權事務高級專員圖爾克（Volker Türk）於周五表示極度擔憂，指出僅在 3 月初以來，蘇丹已有超過 200 名平民死於無人機襲擊。圖爾克警告說，蘇丹武裝部隊和快速支援部隊越來越多地在人口稠密地區部署強大的爆炸性武器，顯示出對國際人道法極其魯莽的漠視。[ref:5]

同時，在剛果民主共和國東部，衝突加劇，一次無人機襲擊了戈馬市，震驚了國際社會。周三上午，一架無人機擊中了一個高檔社區 Himbi 的一棟住宅樓，該區域據悉是許多國際援助人員的住所。襲擊造成三人死亡，其中包括一名為聯合國兒童基金會（UNICEF）工作的法國國民。雖然目前佔領戈馬的 M23 叛亂組織將襲擊歸咎於剛果軍方，但金沙薩政府表示正在調查爆炸的來源。非洲聯盟和多個聯合國機構譴責了這次襲擊，強調人道主義工作人員及其設施絕不能成為目標。[ref:4, 7]

除了無人機襲擊外，剛果民主共和國的伊圖里省（Ituri）的暴力事件仍在持續激增。CODECO 民兵組織在 Djugu 領土的一次殘酷襲擊在周三至周四期間造成至少 25 人死亡，其中包括七名兒童。許多受害者是剛從流離失所者營地返回家園恢復耕作的居民。這次民兵暴力的捲土重來，加上 M23 相關部隊佔領了烏維拉（Uvira）等關鍵城市，加劇了世界上最長期的兩場人道主義危機之一。[ref:1]

這兩場危機造成的人道主義損失令人震驚。在蘇丹，估計有 3370 萬人現在需要緊急援助，超過 1200 萬人被迫離開家園。在剛果民主共和國，隨著和平努力持續失敗，國內流離失所者已超過 700 萬人。國際觀察家警告說，先進無人機技術的引入正在加劇這些衝突的新、更致命的階段，使得援助組織越來越難以接觸到身處交火中的數百萬人。[ref:9, 2, 3]

timeline.title: Drone Warfare Escalates in Sudan and DR Congo, Killing Scores of Civilians and Humanitarian Staff
timeline.title_zh: 蘇丹和剛果（DRC）致命無人機襲擊，造成數十名平民和一名聯合國援助人員死亡
timeline.sub_title: Indiscriminate drone strikes targeting markets, schools, and residential areas have claimed over 200 lives in Sudan since March 4, while a UN official was killed in eastern Congo.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 近期針對蘇丹葬禮車隊和剛果（DRC）戈馬市一住宅區的空襲，已造成包括女學生和一名法國聯合國兒童基金會工作人員在內的數十人死亡。
timeline.summary:
The humanitarian crises in Sudan and the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) have reached a devastating new threshold as the proliferation of drone technology fuels a surge in indiscriminate attacks. On Thursday, United Nations Human Rights Chief Volker Türk expressed profound alarm at the rapidly deteriorating situation, noting that advanced drone warfare is being used to deploy explosive weapons in densely populated areas with catastrophic results for non-combatants. Since [ref:2, 6] early March, the use of these remote-controlled platforms has transformed regional battlefields into lethal zones for civilians, school children, and aid workers alike.

In Sudan, the conflict between the Sudanese Armed Forces and the Rapid Support Forces has entered an exceptionally bloody phase. Reports indicate that more than 200 civilians have been killed by drone strikes in just the last eight days. One [ref:7] of the most harrowing incidents occurred in Shukeiri village, located in White Nile state, where a drone strike on Wednesday hit a secondary school and a health clinic. The [ref:6, 2] attack resulted in the deaths of at least 17 people, the majority of whom were young schoolgirls. Further [ref:7, 3] west, in the Darfur region near the border with Chad, a Sudanese army drone strike targeted the Adikong market on Thursday. That [ref:7, 3, 5] strike killed 13 people, including small-scale traders and laborers, and set fire to critical fuel reserves. Medical teams from Doctors Without Borders reported treating dozens of wounded survivors, including many children under the age of 15, as hospitals struggle to cope with the influx of trauma cases.

Simultaneously, the eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo has seen a similarly lethal escalation. In Goma, which has been under the control of M23 rebels since early 2025, a series of drone-linked explosions rocked the city center on Wednesday and Thursday. One strike directly hit a residential building used by humanitarian personnel, killing Karine Buisset, a French national working for UNICEF. The UN [ref:4] and the African Union have condemned the attack, which also claimed the lives of several other civilians. While [ref:1] the M23 rebel group has blamed the Congolese military for the strike, the government in Kinshasa has yet to take responsibility, stating only that an investigation is underway to determine the origin of the explosions.

The human cost of these technological advancements is compounded by a total breakdown in humanitarian access. In the DRC’s Ituri Province, the UN warns that displacement sites are becoming dangerously overcrowded, with the Plaine Savo site now hosting double its capacity from only two months ago. In Sudan [ref:6], the expansion of drone strikes into the White Nile and Kordofan regions has forced thousands more to flee, adding to the 11 million already displaced. Human rights officials and aid organizations are calling for an immediate cessation of the use of explosive weapons in populated areas, warning that the current trajectory of the conflict is leading toward an unparalleled regional emergency where nowhere is safe for those caught in the crossfire.
timeline.summary_zh:
蘇丹和剛果民主共和國（DRC）的無人機戰爭激增，在過去24小時內造成了重大的平民傷亡，這預示著地區衝突的危險升級。在蘇丹，至少有69人在兩起針對平民目標的無人機襲擊事件中喪生。其中最致命的一起發生在西科爾多凡，一架無人機襲擊了一輛載有參加葬禮人員的卡車。當地醫療消息證實，52人，其中大部分是同一家庭的婦女和兒童，在這場爆炸中喪生。隨後，在白尼羅河州，一架裝載爆炸物的無人機於週三襲擊了舒凱里村的一所中學和鄰近的健康診所。此次襲擊造成17人死亡，包括九名學生和多名教師，進一步摧毀了一個沒有軍事存在的社區。[ref:5, 1, 2, 7, 3]

同時，剛果民主共和國東部城市戈馬發生了一起備受國際譴責的知名無人機襲擊事件。週三凌晨，一架無人機襲擊了Himbi區的一棟住宅樓，造成至少三人死亡。死者中包括法籍人士、聯合國兒童基金會（UNICEF）員工Karine Buisset。此次襲擊發生在前總統約瑟夫·卡比拉的住所附近，並引發了剛果政府與M23叛軍之間激烈的相互指責。叛軍將此次襲擊歸咎於國民軍，而政府官員則一貫指責M23及其所謂的盧旺達支持者利用先進的無人機技術來破壞該地區的穩定。聯合國在剛果（DRC）的維和特派團警告說，針對國際人員的殺戮可能構成戰爭罪。[ref:9, 6]

兩國日益依賴遠程空中作戰，已從根本上改變了人道主義狀況。在蘇丹，快速支援部隊和正規軍被指控進行無差別砲擊，蘇丹醫生網絡報告稱，在科爾多凡和白尼羅河地區，無人機襲擊已成為幾乎每天發生的事件。來自空中的持續威脅迫使包括世界糧食計劃署在內的主要援助組織暫停或縮減在包括藍尼羅河州在內的幾個州的運營。人道主義工作者報告說，隨著辦公室關閉和工作人員疏散以躲避頻繁的轟炸，他們現在無法運送食物或醫療用品。

包括法國總統埃馬紐埃爾·馬克龍和歐盟官員在內的國際領導人，已發出緊急呼籲，要求所有交戰方遵守國際人道主義法。最近的死亡事件凸顯了非戰鬥人員和援助人員極易受到不斷演變的技術戰爭的傷害。由於在蘇丹和剛果（DRC）的政治解決努力仍陷入僵局，無人機使用的擴大預示著衝突進入了一個嚴峻的新階段，平民基礎設施——包括學校、醫院和市場——面臨被襲擊或遭受災難性附帶損害的風險越來越大。[ref:4, 10, 8]

stories.title: Lethal Drone Strikes in Sudan and DRC Claim Hundreds as Regional Conflicts Enter Dangerous New Phase
stories.title_zh: 蘇丹和剛果民主共和國致命無人機襲擊造成數百人死亡，地區衝突進入危險新階段
stories.sub_title: Recent aerial bombardments targeting markets and residential areas have killed over 200 civilians in Sudan and a UN aid worker in Goma, further destabilizing already fragile humanitarian corridors.
stories.sub_title_zh: 近期針對市場和住宅區的空襲已在蘇丹造成 200 多名平民死亡，並導致一名聯合國援助工作人員在戈馬喪生，進一步破壞了本已脆弱的人道走廊。
stories.summary:
The systematic use of increasingly sophisticated combat drones has reached a catastrophic threshold in both Sudan and the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) this week. United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights, Volker Türk, expressed profound alarm on Thursday, revealing that more than 200 civilians have been killed by drone attacks in Sudan since March 4 alone. This [ref:8, 6, 4, 1, 2] surge in aerial warfare marks a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict between the Sudanese Armed Forces (SAF) and the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces (RSF), as both sides increasingly rely on foreign-supplied drone technology to bypass traditional frontlines and strike deep into populated civilian hubs.

In one of the most recent atrocities, a drone strike on Thursday targeted the Adikong market near the Sudan-Chad border, killing at least 11 people and injuring more than 20 others. According [ref:5] to Médecins Sans Frontières (MSF), which treated the wounded at a nearby hospital in Adre, Chad, the strike hit a fuel market, causing massive explosions and incinerating small-scale traders and their goods. This crossing serves as a critical lifeline for humanitarian aid and medicine entering the Darfur region; its disruption threatens to isolate millions of displaced persons already on the brink of famine. 

The political fallout in Sudan has been immediate and severe. On Saturday, Sudan’s army chief and Sovereign Council head, Abdel Fattah al-Burhan, visited the village of Shukairi in White Nile State to inspect the site of a March 11 strike that killed 17 civilians, including several schoolgirls. Standing amid the ruins of a secondary school and health clinic, Burhan ruled out any possibility of coexistence or negotiation with the RSF. He described the paramilitary group’s actions as devoid of humanity and vowed to continue the military campaign until the rebellion is entirely dismantled, effectively stalling regional and international peace initiatives.

Parallel to the crisis in Sudan, the eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo has seen a similarly lethal escalation in Goma. On Wednesday, a drone strike hit the upmarket residential neighborhood of Himbi, killing Karine Buisset, a French aid worker for UNICEF. The attack, which [ref:3, 7] struck near the residence of former President Joseph Kabila, has prompted a diplomatic crisis, with the Congolese government and M23 rebels exchanging accusations of ceasefire violations. The strike occurred despite a fragile peace agreement recently brokered by international partners to enable regional stability and secure mining interests.

The humanitarian implications of these strikes are devastating. Across both regions, nearly 18 million people remain displaced, and the targeting of aid workers and vital infrastructure has made the delivery of relief nearly impossible in active combat zones. International leaders, including French President Emmanuel Macron and UN officials, have renewed their calls for all parties to respect international humanitarian law and halt the indiscriminate use of explosive weapons in urban areas. As drone warfare becomes the defining feature of these conflicts, the risk of a total regional collapse continues to grow, leaving millions of civilians caught in the crossfire of a technological arms race.
stories.summary_zh:
本週，越來越複雜的戰鬥無人機系統性使用已在蘇丹和剛果民主共和國 (DRC) 達到了災難性的臨界點。聯合國人權事務高級專員沃爾克·特克週四表示深切憂慮，透露自 3 月 4 日以來，僅在蘇丹就有超過 200 名平民死於無人機襲擊。這次空中戰爭的激增標誌著蘇丹武裝部隊 (SAF) 和準軍事快速支援部隊 (RSF) 之間持續衝突的重大升級，雙方日益依賴外國供應的無人機技術來繞過傳統戰線，深入人口稠密的平民中心進行打擊。[ref:8, 6, 4, 1, 2]

在最近一次慘劇中，週四的一次無人機襲擊目標是蘇丹與乍得邊境附近的 Adikong 市場，造成至少 11 人死亡，20 多人受傷。據在乍得 Adre 附近醫院救治傷者的無國界醫生組織 (MSF) 稱，襲擊擊中了燃料市場，引發了大規模爆炸，並燒毀了小商販及其貨物。這個過境點是進入達爾富爾地區人道援助和藥品的重要生命線；其中斷威脅著數百萬本已瀕臨飢餓的流離失所者。[ref:5]

蘇丹的政治影響是直接而嚴重的。週六，蘇丹軍方總司令兼主權委員會主席阿卜杜勒·法塔赫·布爾漢訪問了白尼羅州 Shukairi 村，視察了 3 月 11 日造成 17 名平民（包括幾名女學生）死亡的襲擊現場。站在一所中學和一家診所的廢墟中，布爾漢排除了與 RSF 和平共存或談判的可能性。他將該準軍事組織的行為描述為沒有人性，並誓言將繼續軍事行動，直到叛亂被徹底剷除，這實際上使地區和國際和平倡議停滯不前。[ref:3, 7]

與蘇丹的危機平行，剛果民主共和國東部地區的戈馬也出現了類似致命的升級。週三，一次無人機襲擊擊中了戈馬的高檔住宅區 Himbi，造成聯合國兒童基金會的法國援助工作人員 Karine Buisset 死亡。這次襲擊發生在前總統約瑟夫·卡比拉的住所附近，引發了外交危機，剛果政府和 M23 叛軍互相指責違反停火協議。儘管國際夥伴最近促成了一項脆弱的和平協議以促進地區穩定和保護礦產資源，但襲擊仍舊發生了。[ref:null]

這些襲擊對人道主義的影響是毀滅性的。在兩個地區，近 1800 萬人仍然流離失所，援助工作人員和關鍵基礎設施的目標化使得在活躍戰區提供援助幾乎成為不可能。包括法國總統馬克龍和聯合國官員在內的國際領導人已重申他們呼籲所有各方遵守國際人道法，並停止在城市地區不分青紅皂白地使用爆炸性武器。隨著無人機戰爭成為這些衝突的決定性特徵，整個地區全面崩潰的風險持續增長，使數百萬平民陷入技術軍備競賽的槍林彈雨之中。[ref:null]

stories.label: COLLAR members Candy and Ivy So launch solo careers with debut singles
stories.label_zh: COLLAR成員Candy及So I-vey展開個人事業，並推出首張單曲

timeline.title: COLLAR Icons Candy Wong and Ivy So Debut Solo Singles Amidst Intense Industry Fanfare
timeline.title_zh: COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 與 Ivy So 隆重推出個人單曲，掀起業界熱潮
timeline.sub_title: Members of Hong Kong girl group COLLAR, Candy Wong and Ivy So, have officially entered the solo market with simultaneous ballad releases, marking a significant expansion for the group.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 香港女子組合 COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 和 Ivy So 正式進軍樂壇，同步推出抒情歌曲，標誌著組合的重大發展。
timeline.summary:
The Hong Kong music industry has been set abuzz by the simultaneous solo debuts of COLLAR members Candy Wong and Ivy So. Following in the footsteps of their teammates Marf Yau, Winka Chan, Sumling Li, and Day Hui, the two idols—often referred to as the group’s 'Goddesses'—have officially launched their individual careers with the release of their first singles. This coordinated [ref:7, 4, 8, 2] launch, colloquially dubbed the 'Fairy War' by local media, represents a major milestone for the group as it enters its fourth year of activity, showcasing the diverse talents and personal growth of its members.

Candy Wong’s debut single, titled 'Straightforward' (直白), features lyrics by the renowned lyricist Wyman Wong. The track is a [ref:7, 8, 2] poignant slow ballad that utilizes a romantic narrative to explore the importance of direct communication in all relationships. Candy shared that while the music video’s story is not a personal experience, the song reflects her own simple and direct character. She noted that the [ref:7] track serves as a personal reminder to be more open with her family, expressing feelings of love and gratitude that she previously found difficult to voice. The choice of a 'soft' debut marks a departure from the high-energy dance tracks typically associated with COLLAR, allowing her vocal clarity to take center stage.

Simultaneously, Ivy So released her first single, 'Give You a Big Mouth Boy' (給你一隻大口仔), also known as 'SMILE (Not For Sale).' In a significant move for her artistic [ref:7, 8, 4, 2] development, Ivy participated in the songwriting process as a lyricist for the first time. The song’s title is a playful nod to her well-known nickname among fans, 'Big Mouth So,' which she has come to embrace as a symbol of her cheerful personality. Ivy described the track as a source [ref:7, 4, 8] of comfort and warmth, intended to make listeners feel embraced and cared for during difficult times. She admitted that the process of conceptualizing [ref:7] her solo identity was challenging, involving numerous revisions to the lyrics to ensure the song truly represented her 'deep down' self.

Despite the competitive nature of simultaneous releases, the two members have emphasized their mutual support. Throughout the production process—from [ref:7] selecting tracks to recording and filming music videos—Candy and Ivy remained in close contact, even hosting a joint 'Canvy' Instagram Live session on the night of the release to watch their videos with fans. They expressed that having each other's company during this transition helped alleviate the immense pressure of living up to the successful solo tracks previously released by other COLLAR members.

Industry analysts view these debuts as a strategic move to solidify COLLAR's dominance in the Canto-pop scene following their sweep of major awards in 2025. By choosing ballads over dance-pop, both Candy and Ivy have successfully showcased their versatility as vocalists, further broadening the group's appeal. As the singles begin their ascent on the charts [ref:7, 8, 2], the focus now turns to upcoming promotional events and potential live performances where the two will balance their solo duties with group activities.
timeline.summary_zh:
香港樂壇因 COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 和 Ivy So 的同步個人出道而熱鬧非凡。繼隊友 Marf Yau、Winka Chan、Sumling Li 和 Day Hui 之後，這兩位被譽為組合 '女神' 的偶像，正式發行了她們的首支單曲，開啟了個人演藝生涯。這次協調一致的發佈，被本地媒體戲稱為 '仙女戰爭'，對於進入第四個活動年份的組合來說，是一個重要的里程碑，展現了成員們多樣化的才華和個人成長。[ref:7, 4, 8, 2]

Candy Wong 的出道單曲名為《直白》(Straightforward)，歌詞由著名填詞人黃偉文操刀。這首歌曲是一首感人至深的慢板抒情曲，透過浪漫的敘事探討在所有關係中直接溝通的重要性。Candy 分享說，雖然音樂錄影帶的故事並非個人經歷，但歌曲反映了她自己簡單直接的性格。她指出，這首歌提醒她要更向家人表達愛與感激，這些情感她過去難以啟齒。選擇 '柔和' 的出道方式，標誌著與 COLLAR 通常的高能量舞曲風格的區別，讓她清晰的唱功成為焦點。[ref:7, 8, 2]

與此同時，Ivy So 發布了她的第一支單曲《給你一隻大口仔》，又名《SMILE (Not For Sale)》。作為她藝術發展的重要一步，Ivy 首次參與了歌曲創作，擔任填詞人。歌曲的標題是對她粉絲間廣為人知的暱稱 '大口 So' 的俏皮致敬，她已將此視為自己開朗個性的象徵。Ivy 將這首歌描述為一種舒適和溫暖的來源，旨在讓聽眾在困難時期感到被擁抱和關懷。她承認，構思個人身份的過程充滿挑戰，歌詞經過多次修改，以確保歌曲真正代表她 '內心深處' 的自我。[ref:7, 8, 4, 2]

儘管同步發行競爭激烈，兩位成員仍強調了彼此的支持。在整個製作過程中，從選曲到錄音和拍攝音樂錄影帶，Candy 和 Ivy 保持緊密聯繫，甚至在發行當晚共同進行了 'Canvy' Instagram 直播，與粉絲一起觀看她們的 MV。她們表示，在這一過渡時期彼此的陪伴，幫助緩解了人們對她們的個人單曲必須與 COLLAR 其他成員成功的個人歌曲媲美的巨大壓力。[ref:7]

業內分析人士認為，這次出道是 COLLAR 在 2025 年橫掃各大獎項後，鞏固其在粵語流行樂壇主導地位的戰略舉措。通過選擇抒情歌曲而非舞曲，Candy 和 Ivy 都成功展示了她們作為歌手的多樣性，進一步拓寬了組合的吸引力。隨著單曲開始在排行榜上攀升，現在的焦點轉向即將到來的宣傳活動和可能的現場表演，屆時兩人將平衡她們的個人職責與組合的活動。[ref:7, 8, 2]

timeline.title: COLLAR Stars Candy and Ivy So Ignite Cantopop Scene With Highly Anticipated Solo Debut Singles
timeline.title_zh: COLLAR 成員 Candy 和 Ivy So 攜備受期待的個人出道單曲點燃粵語流行樂壇
timeline.sub_title: Following their joint release on March 12, members Candy and Ivy So have transitioned into solo territory, marking a significant strategic evolution for MakerVille’s flagship girl group.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 繼 3 月 12 日聯合發行後，成員 Candy 和 Ivy So 已轉向個人發展，標誌著 MakerVille 旗艦女子組合的重大戰略演變。
timeline.summary:
The Hong Kong music landscape reached a significant milestone as COLLAR members Candy Wong and Ivy So officially launched their solo careers on March 12, 2026. The debut, marketed under the popular collaborative "Canvy" moniker, featured the simultaneous release of two distinct singles: Candy’s introspective track "直白" (Direct) and Ivy So’s playful, high-energy anthem "給你一隻大口仔" (Give You a Big-Mouthed Boy). This dual launch represents a pivotal phase in COLLAR’s development, utilizing a "solo-within-a-group" strategy that allows individual members to explore personal artistic identities while the seven-member collective continues its dominant run in the industry.

To celebrate the release, the duo hosted a high-profile Instagram Live session yesterday evening, inviting thousands of dedicated supporters to a virtual "MV premiere party." During the broadcast, Candy and Ivy shared intimate behind-the-scenes stories from their respective recording sessions and music video shoots. Candy, who has often been categorized as the group's "visual" member, demonstrated remarkable vocal maturity in "直白." The track serves as a testament to her technical growth following months of intensive vocal training with renowned producer Mike Orange. Fans noted her improved range and emotional delivery [ref:1], which many described as a "graduation" from her early idol days into a serious recording artist.

Simultaneously, Ivy So’s debut single, "給你一隻大口仔," has captivated audiences with its infectious energy and vibrant visual aesthetics. The song reinforces Ivy’s reputation as one of the most charismatic [ref:1] performers in contemporary Cantopop, blending catchy hooks with a persona that fans—collectively known as "Nights"—have embraced since her time on the reality show King Maker IV. The music video’s art direction and styling have already sparked trends on social [ref:1] media, with listeners praising the production quality and the playful narrative that aligns perfectly with her public image.

Public reception has been overwhelmingly positive, with both music videos quickly climbing the trending charts on local streaming platforms and YouTube. On discussion forums such as LIHKG, the release has been framed as a friendly "Canvy Battle," a promotional concept that has successfully drummed up engagement from both individual fan bases. Critics have highlighted the complementary nature of the two releases; while Candy explores a sophisticated pop-ballad sound, Ivy leans into the upbeat dance-pop territory that has become a staple of the COLLAR brand. This strategic diversification is seen as a move to broaden the group’s demographic reach and solidify their individual marketability.

Looking ahead, the momentum is expected to continue with a dedicated fan meeting scheduled for Saturday, March 14, 2026. This event will provide the first opportunity for fans to interact directly with the members [ref:1] regarding their solo endeavors. As COLLAR continues to evolve, the successful transition of Candy and Ivy into solo work—following the paths previously blazed by members like Marf and Winka—signals a new era for the group. By fostering individual stars within a cohesive unit, MakerVille is successfully rebranding COLLAR from a reality-show-formed act into a multi-faceted powerhouse of versatile entertainers.
timeline.summary_zh:
香港樂壇在 2026 年 3 月 12 日迎來重要里程碑，COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 和 Ivy So 正式展開個人演藝生涯。這次以廣受歡迎的合作「Canvy」名義進行的出道，同時發行了兩首風格迥異的單曲：Candy 的內省之作《直白》（Direct），以及 Ivy So 充滿活力、節奏明快的歌曲《給你一隻大口仔》（Give You a Big-Mouthed Boy）。這次雙重發行標誌著 COLLAR 發展的一個關鍵階段，採用了「團體內的個人發展」策略，讓每位成員都能探索個人藝術身份，同時七人組合將繼續在業界保持其主導地位。

為了慶祝這次發行，兩人昨日晚間舉辦了一場備受矚目的 Instagram 直播，邀請了數千名忠實粉絲參加虛擬「MV 首播派對」。在直播中，Candy 和 Ivy 分享了她們各自錄音室和音樂錄影帶拍攝期間的許多幕後故事。Candy，常被歸類為組合的「門面」成員，在《直白》中展現了驚人的聲樂成熟度。這首歌曲證明了她在與著名製作人 Mike Orange 進行數月密集聲樂訓練後，在技術上的顯著進步。粉絲們注意到她聲音的音域擴展和情感表達的提升，許多人形容這是她從早期偶像階段「畢業」，成為一名認真錄音藝術家的標誌。[ref:1]

同時，Ivy So 的出道單曲《給你一隻大口仔》以其感染力的活力和鮮豔的視覺美學俘獲了觀眾。這首歌鞏固了 Ivy 作為當代粵語流行樂壇最具魅力的表演者之一的聲譽，融合了朗朗上口的旋律和自她參加選秀節目《Making Star King Maker IV》以來粉絲（統稱為「Nights」）所喜愛的個人風格。音樂錄影帶的藝術指導和造型已經在社交媒體上引發了潮流，聽眾們稱讚其製作質量以及與她公眾形象完美契合的俏皮敘事。[ref:1]

公眾的反應是壓倒性的正面，兩首音樂錄影帶迅速登上本地串流媒體平台和 YouTube 的熱門排行榜。在 LIHKG 等討論區，這次發行被描繪成一場友好的「Canvy 大戰」，這一宣傳概念成功地引起了雙方粉絲群的熱烈參與。評論家們強調了這兩首作品的互補性；Candy 探索的是精緻的流行抒情曲風，而 Ivy 則偏向於已成為 COLLAR 品牌標誌的 upbeat 舞曲風格。這種戰略性的多元化被視為擴大組合的受眾群體並鞏固其個人市場吸引力的一步。

展望未來，預計這一勢頭將在 2026 年 3 月 14 日星期六舉行的專屬粉絲見面會上持續。這次活動將是粉絲們首次有機會就她們的個人發展與成員們進行直接交流。隨著 COLLAR 持續發展，Candy 和 Ivy 在繼 Marf 和 Winka 等成員開闢的道路後成功轉型為個人發展，標誌著組合的新時代。通過在一個協調一致的團體中培養獨立明星，MakerVille 成功地將 COLLAR 從一個選秀節目組成的團體，重新定位為一個多才多藝的藝人強大組合。[ref:1]

timeline.title: COLLAR Members Candy Wong and Ivy So Officially Launch Solo Careers with Concurrent Debut Singles
timeline.title_zh: COLLAR 成員 Wong Candy 與 So Ivy 正式以同步單曲發佈開啟個人事業
timeline.sub_title: The two popular stars released 'Straightforward' and 'Giving You a Big Mouth Boy' to radio today, leaving leader Gao as the group's final member to debut solo.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 這對人氣香港女子組合的視覺擔當今日同時推出個人單曲「Frank」與「Give You a Big Mouth Boy」，標誌著組合發展的重要里程碑。
timeline.summary:
The Hong Kong music scene reached a significant milestone today, March 12, 2026, as COLLAR members Candy Wong and Ivy So officially transitioned into solo artistry. Following a year of intense speculation and a high-profile announcement on March 11, the two singers released their debut singles, 'Straightforward' and 'Giving You a Big Mouth Boy,' to major radio stations across the territory. [ref:5, 1, 2] This dual launch has been dubbed the 'Battle of the Fairies' by local media and fans, highlighting the immense popularity of both performers, who are widely regarded as the 'visual' centers of the seven-member girl group.

Candy Wong’s debut track, 'Straightforward,' represents a departure from her early group persona, leaning into a more mature and resilient image. Music [ref:1, 2] industry insiders have noted that the song highlights her steady vocal growth, a journey that became evident during COLLAR's 'GAME ON' concert series in late 2025. Producers [ref:5, 1, 3] previously described Candy as having a 'warrior-like' determination, a trait she has channeled into this new project. The [ref:5, 1, 3, 2] single's production focuses on candid storytelling, matching its title by exploring themes of self-discovery and the challenges of being under the public's constant scrutiny during the group’s first four years.

Simultaneously, Ivy So has embraced her playful side with 'Giving You a Big Mouth Boy.' The title [ref:1, 2] is a direct and affectionate nod to her famous nickname and the cheerful personality that has made her a fan favorite. Despite [ref:1, 4] the lighthearted title, the track showcases her vocal range and the physical discipline she has maintained. Leading [ref:5, 1, 3, 2] up to the release, Ivy and Candy shared a teaser video on social media that showcased their toned physiques, signaling that their solo ventures would be defined by both artistic and physical 'strength.' Fans have [ref:5, 1, 2] flooded social media platforms with positive feedback, praising Ivy for her ability to maintain her signature charm while delivering a polished solo performance.

With these two debuts, COLLAR has entered a new phase of its evolution. Out of the [ref:1, 2] seven members who debuted in early 2022, six have now officially launched solo careers, including Marf, Winka, Day, and Sumling. This leaves [ref:5, 1, 2] only the group’s leader, Gao, as the remaining member without a solo single. Gao has been [ref:5, 1, 2] highly supportive of her teammates, even jokingly suggesting a remix of both song titles on social media. The group recently [ref:5, 1, 2] celebrated their fourth anniversary in January 2026 with a massive 'Sign-and-Sing' event, where hints about the upcoming solo projects first began to surface.

Industry analysts suggest that MakerVille’s decision to release both singles on the same day is a strategic move to capitalize on the competitive yet friendly rivalry between the members’ fanbases. This 'Battle of the [ref:1] Fairies' has successfully dominated entertainment headlines, ensuring that COLLAR remains at the forefront of the Canto-pop industry. As the group continues [ref:1, 2] to balance collective activities with individual growth, the successful launch of Candy and Ivy’s solo paths sets a strong precedent for the remaining developments in COLLAR's 2026 roadmap.
timeline.summary_zh:
今日，香港樂壇掀起熱潮，COLLAR 成員 Wong Candy 與 So Ivy 正式展開了她們向個人藝術家發展的轉型。這兩位長期被視為人氣女子組合「視覺 icon」的成員，於2026年3月12日同步發佈了她們的首張個人單曲。Ivy So 推出了她的第一首音樂作品「Give You a Big Mouth Boy」，而 Wong Candy 則揭曉了她的個人出道曲「Frank」。這次同步發佈被粉絲和本地媒體戲稱為「仙子之戰」，是對她們在同一天展開競爭但又友好關係的一種幽默稱呼。[ref:2]

同時發佈單曲的決定在 Cantopop 社群中引起了極大的關注。粉絲們注意到了兩位偶像在藝術方向上的鮮明對比。Ivy So 的出道曲被描述為具有活潑且充滿活力的風格，與粉絲們喜愛的她本人形象相符。相對地，Wong Candy 的「Frank」則探索了這位年輕歌手更內省和真誠的一面，展現了她自首次亮相選秀節目《King Maker IV》以來的歌唱進步。兩位藝人均投入數月時間進行聲樂訓練和體能準備，以確保她們的個人出道能夠達到粉絲們的高度期望。[ref:2, 6, 3]

這次同步出道不僅是兩位歌手個人的成就，更是 COLLAR 整個組合向前邁出的重要一步。隨著這些單曲的發佈，組合七名成員中幾乎所有人都已在團體活動之外建立了個人音樂事業。根據最近 CR2 電台預告片的報導，目前僅有隊長 Gao 尚未發佈個人單曲。這種策略性的推廣表明，該組合有意多元化其產品線，以期在即將到來的2026年頒獎季中，無論是團體還是個人都取得主導地位。[ref:5, 2, 4, 1]

儘管排行榜競爭激烈，組合內部的支持依然強勁。隊長 Gao 本週早些時候對她的隊友們表達了興奮之情，甚至幽默地提議將兩首歌名混合創作一首「混音」歌曲，以示中立支持。此前，成員們在社交媒體上通過一段聯合舞蹈視頻預告了這些個人項目，展示了她們在準備個人 MV 拍攝時所經歷的嚴格訓練和「肌肉鍛鍊」。這種情誼有助於平息任何內部競爭的傳言，強調這次雙重發佈是對組合集體才華的一次慶祝。[ref:2, 1]

行業分析師預計，Candy 和 Ivy 都將成為各大「最佳新人」獎項的有力競爭者，進一步鞏固 COLLAR 在香港娛樂產業的強勢地位。隨著這些單曲今日開始在各大電台播出，粉絲們正熱切期待完整音樂錄影帶和現場表演的發佈。這次雙重發佈標誌著組合的一個新篇章，突顯了儘管她們仍是一個緊密的集體，但每位成員都擁有獨特的音樂願景，準備在個人舞台上進行探索。[ref:2]

stories.title: COLLAR Icons Candy Wong and Ivy So Debut Solo Singles Amidst Intense Industry Fanfare
stories.title_zh: COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 與 Ivy So 隆重推出個人單曲，掀起業界熱潮
stories.sub_title: Members of Hong Kong girl group COLLAR, Candy Wong and Ivy So, have officially entered the solo market with simultaneous ballad releases, marking a significant expansion for the group.
stories.sub_title_zh: 香港女子組合 COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 和 Ivy So 正式進軍樂壇，同步推出抒情歌曲，標誌著組合的重大發展。
stories.summary:
The Hong Kong music industry has been set abuzz by the simultaneous solo debuts of COLLAR members Candy Wong and Ivy So. Following in the footsteps of their teammates Marf Yau, Winka Chan, Sumling Li, and Day Hui, the two idols—often referred to as the group’s 'Goddesses'—have officially launched their individual careers with the release of their first singles. This coordinated [ref:7, 4, 8, 2] launch, colloquially dubbed the 'Fairy War' by local media, represents a major milestone for the group as it enters its fourth year of activity, showcasing the diverse talents and personal growth of its members.

Candy Wong’s debut single, titled 'Straightforward' (直白), features lyrics by the renowned lyricist Wyman Wong. The track is a [ref:7, 8, 2] poignant slow ballad that utilizes a romantic narrative to explore the importance of direct communication in all relationships. Candy shared that while the music video’s story is not a personal experience, the song reflects her own simple and direct character. She noted that the [ref:7] track serves as a personal reminder to be more open with her family, expressing feelings of love and gratitude that she previously found difficult to voice. The choice of a 'soft' debut marks a departure from the high-energy dance tracks typically associated with COLLAR, allowing her vocal clarity to take center stage.

Simultaneously, Ivy So released her first single, 'Give You a Big Mouth Boy' (給你一隻大口仔), also known as 'SMILE (Not For Sale).' In a significant move for her artistic [ref:7, 8, 4, 2] development, Ivy participated in the songwriting process as a lyricist for the first time. The song’s title is a playful nod to her well-known nickname among fans, 'Big Mouth So,' which she has come to embrace as a symbol of her cheerful personality. Ivy described the track as a source [ref:7, 4, 8] of comfort and warmth, intended to make listeners feel embraced and cared for during difficult times. She admitted that the process of conceptualizing [ref:7] her solo identity was challenging, involving numerous revisions to the lyrics to ensure the song truly represented her 'deep down' self.

Despite the competitive nature of simultaneous releases, the two members have emphasized their mutual support. Throughout the production process—from [ref:7] selecting tracks to recording and filming music videos—Candy and Ivy remained in close contact, even hosting a joint 'Canvy' Instagram Live session on the night of the release to watch their videos with fans. They expressed that having each other's company during this transition helped alleviate the immense pressure of living up to the successful solo tracks previously released by other COLLAR members.

Industry analysts view these debuts as a strategic move to solidify COLLAR's dominance in the Canto-pop scene following their sweep of major awards in 2025. By choosing ballads over dance-pop, both Candy and Ivy have successfully showcased their versatility as vocalists, further broadening the group's appeal. As the singles begin their ascent on the charts [ref:7, 8, 2], the focus now turns to upcoming promotional events and potential live performances where the two will balance their solo duties with group activities.
stories.summary_zh:
香港樂壇因 COLLAR 成員 Candy Wong 和 Ivy So 的同步個人出道而熱鬧非凡。繼隊友 Marf Yau、Winka Chan、Sumling Li 和 Day Hui 之後，這兩位被譽為組合 '女神' 的偶像，正式發行了她們的首支單曲，開啟了個人演藝生涯。這次協調一致的發佈，被本地媒體戲稱為 '仙女戰爭'，對於進入第四個活動年份的組合來說，是一個重要的里程碑，展現了成員們多樣化的才華和個人成長。[ref:7, 4, 8, 2]

Candy Wong 的出道單曲名為《直白》(Straightforward)，歌詞由著名填詞人黃偉文操刀。這首歌曲是一首感人至深的慢板抒情曲，透過浪漫的敘事探討在所有關係中直接溝通的重要性。Candy 分享說，雖然音樂錄影帶的故事並非個人經歷，但歌曲反映了她自己簡單直接的性格。她指出，這首歌提醒她要更向家人表達愛與感激，這些情感她過去難以啟齒。選擇 '柔和' 的出道方式，標誌著與 COLLAR 通常的高能量舞曲風格的區別，讓她清晰的唱功成為焦點。[ref:7, 8, 2]

與此同時，Ivy So 發布了她的第一支單曲《給你一隻大口仔》，又名《SMILE (Not For Sale)》。作為她藝術發展的重要一步，Ivy 首次參與了歌曲創作，擔任填詞人。歌曲的標題是對她粉絲間廣為人知的暱稱 '大口 So' 的俏皮致敬，她已將此視為自己開朗個性的象徵。Ivy 將這首歌描述為一種舒適和溫暖的來源，旨在讓聽眾在困難時期感到被擁抱和關懷。她承認，構思個人身份的過程充滿挑戰，歌詞經過多次修改，以確保歌曲真正代表她 '內心深處' 的自我。[ref:7, 8, 4, 2]

儘管同步發行競爭激烈，兩位成員仍強調了彼此的支持。在整個製作過程中，從選曲到錄音和拍攝音樂錄影帶，Candy 和 Ivy 保持緊密聯繫，甚至在發行當晚共同進行了 'Canvy' Instagram 直播，與粉絲一起觀看她們的 MV。她們表示，在這一過渡時期彼此的陪伴，幫助緩解了人們對她們的個人單曲必須與 COLLAR 其他成員成功的個人歌曲媲美的巨大壓力。[ref:7]

業內分析人士認為，這次出道是 COLLAR 在 2025 年橫掃各大獎項後，鞏固其在粵語流行樂壇主導地位的戰略舉措。通過選擇抒情歌曲而非舞曲，Candy 和 Ivy 都成功展示了她們作為歌手的多樣性，進一步拓寬了組合的吸引力。隨著單曲開始在排行榜上攀升，現在的焦點轉向即將到來的宣傳活動和可能的現場表演，屆時兩人將平衡她們的個人職責與組合的活動。[ref:7, 8, 2]

stories.label: Browser engines achieve milestone in global compatibility and mobile WebGPU support
stories.label_zh: 瀏覽器引擎在全球兼容性及流動裝置WebGPU支援方面達成里程碑

timeline.title: Global Browser Convergence Accelerates as Chrome 146 Introduces WebGPU Compatibility Mode for Legacy Hardware
timeline.title_zh: 全球瀏覽器整合加速，Chrome 146 引入舊硬體 WebGPU 相容模式
timeline.sub_title: Major engine developers finalize high-performance graphics standards for 2026 while implementing new security restrictions to protect mobile users from advanced browser-based GPU exploits.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 主要引擎開發商為2026年制定高性能圖形標準，同時實施新的安全限制，以保護行動用戶免受基於瀏覽器的進階GPU漏洞攻擊。
timeline.summary:
The global web ecosystem has reached a definitive stabilization point this week as the transition from the legacy WebGL era to the high-performance WebGPU standard enters its final phase of mass adoption. Within the last 24 hours, the rollout of Google Chrome 146 has emerged as a central development, introducing a sophisticated 'Compatibility Mode' designed to bridge the gap between cutting-edge software and older hardware architectures. By allowing a subset of WebGPU APIs to operate on legacy systems supporting only OpenGL ES 3.1 or Direct3D 11, the Chromium team has significantly expanded the reachable audience for browser-based 3D applications and local AI inference.

This technical milestone coincides with the broader 'Interop 2026' initiative, a collaborative effort between Apple, Google, Microsoft, and Mozilla to ensure that emerging web standards behave consistently across all rendering engines. Reports today highlight that the group has finalized twenty key focus areas for the 2026 cycle, with a heavy emphasis on refining features like CSS Anchor Positioning and View Transitions. This alignment is critical for developers who, until recently, faced significant fragmentation when attempting to deploy GPU-accelerated experiences on mobile platforms. Safari 26 has already unified its versioning across iOS and macOS to reflect the 2026 calendar year, providing a stable, default WebGPU environment for the entire Apple ecosystem.

However, the rapid expansion of hardware access has introduced new security challenges that browser vendors are now forced to address. Intelligence from the past 24 hours indicates that Google is testing a proactive security measure within the Android 16 'Advanced Protection Mode' that would automatically disable WebGPU access in Chrome. This decision stems from the increased attack surface created by giving websites direct access to GPU drivers, which are often less robustly sandboxed than traditional CPU processes. Security researchers have noted that while WebGPU offers 15x to 30x performance gains for compute workloads, it also creates a unique vector for remote code execution and information leaks if vulnerabilities in the underlying graphics stack are exploited.

Mozilla remains the final piece of the compatibility puzzle as it continues to refine its Gecko engine. Following the successful launch of WebGPU in Firefox 147 earlier this year, the organization is currently focusing on bringing stable support to Linux and Android throughout the remainder of 2026. This deliberate approach aims to resolve performance overhead issues in inter-process communication before a wider rollout. As the web platform matures into a viable environment for AAA gaming and complex data visualization, the industry's focus is shifting from simple feature availability to the more nuanced challenges of power management, memory-efficient 'transient attachments,' and the delicate balance between raw hardware power and user safety.
timeline.summary_zh:
全球網絡生態系統本週已達到明確的穩定點，從舊版WebGL時代向高性能WebGPU標準的過渡正進入大規模採用的最後階段。在過去24小時內，Google Chrome 146的推出成為一個核心發展，它引入了一個複雜的「相容模式」，旨在彌合尖端軟體與舊硬體架構之間的差距。通過允許WebGPU API的一個子集在僅支援OpenGL ES 3.1或Direct3D 11的舊系統上運行，Chromium團隊顯著擴大了基於瀏覽器的3D應用程式和本地AI推斷的可觸及受眾。

這一技術里程碑與更廣泛的「Interop 2026」倡議同步，該倡議是蘋果、谷歌、微軟和Mozilla之間的合作，旨在確保新興網頁標準在所有渲染引擎上表現一致。今日的報導強調，該組織已確定了2026年週期中的二十個關鍵重點領域，並高度重視CSS錨點定位和視窗轉換等功能的完善。這種協調對於開發者來說至關重要，他們直到最近在為行動平台部署GPU加速體驗時都面臨嚴重的碎片化問題。Safari 26已統一其在iOS和macOS上的版本，以反映2026年曆法年份，為整個Apple生態系統提供了一個穩定的、預設的WebGPU環境。

然而，硬體存取權的快速擴展引入了新的安全挑戰，瀏覽器供應商現在必須解決。過去24小時的情報表明，Google正在測試Android 16「高級保護模式」中的一項主動安全措施，該措施將自動禁用Chrome中的WebGPU存取。此決定的原因是，將網站直接存取GPU驅動程式增加了攻擊面，而GPU驅動程式的沙盒保護通常不如傳統CPU進程。安全研究人員指出，雖然WebGPU為計算工作負載提供了15到30倍的性能提升，但如果利用底層圖形堆疊中的漏洞，它也為遠端程式碼執行和資訊洩漏創造了一個獨特的途徑。

Mozilla仍然是相容性拼圖中的最後一塊，它繼續完善其Gecko引擎。繼今年早些時候在Firefox 147中成功推出WebGPU後，該組織目前正致力於在2026年剩餘時間內為Linux和Android帶來穩定的支援。這種審慎的方法旨在在更廣泛的推出之前解決進程間通訊中的性能開銷問題。隨著網頁平台日趨成熟，成為AAA遊戲和複雜數據可視化的可行環境，業界的焦點正從簡單的功能可用性轉向更細微的挑戰，如電源管理、記憶體效率高的「暫存附件」，以及原始硬體功率與使用者安全之間微妙的平衡。

timeline.title: Chrome 146 Release Introduces WebGPU Compatibility Mode Expanding High Performance Graphics to Legacy Hardware
timeline.title_zh: Chrome 146 版本推出 WebGPU 相容模式，為舊有硬體擴展高效能圖形支援
timeline.sub_title: The latest browser updates solidify a global shift toward WebGPU, enabling hardware-accelerated computing on older devices while navigating new mobile security challenges in Android 16.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 最新的瀏覽器更新鞏固了全球向 WebGPU 的轉變，使舊裝置能夠進行硬體加速運算，同時應對 Android 16 中的新行動安全挑戰。
timeline.summary:
The global web ecosystem has reached a pivotal stabilization point this week following the stable release of Google Chrome 146, which introduces a highly anticipated compatibility mode for WebGPU. This development marks a significant shift in the 'production-ready' status of the API, as it allows high-performance graphics and compute applications to run on older hardware that lacks support for modern native backends like Vulkan or Direct3D 12. By providing an opt-in fallback to legacy APIs such as OpenGL and Direct3D 11, browser vendors are effectively closing the remaining gaps in global device coverage, which is estimated to have surpassed 70% of all active web users this month.

This latest technical milestone follows the broader convergence of browser engines achieved earlier this year. In January 2026, the industry saw the final pieces of the cross-platform puzzle fall into place as Firefox 147 and Safari 26 enabled WebGPU by default across Windows, macOS, and iOS. The [ref:1] transition from the fifteen-year WebGL era to WebGPU is now considered complete by major stakeholders. Developers are reporting performance gains of up to 30 times for compute-heavy workloads, particularly in browser-based AI inference, where local GPU execution is reaching nearly 80% of native application speed. This [ref:1] efficiency has spurred a wave of 'zero-install' enterprise tools, including digital twins and complex 3D simulators, that were previously restricted to native software environments.

On the mobile front, the landscape is evolving rapidly but faces new scrutiny. While WebGPU is now standard on iOS 26 and Android 12 and above, Google has begun testing a security 'kill switch' for the API in upcoming builds of Android 16. This feature, discovered within the Advanced Protection Mode settings, allows users to disable WebGPU to mitigate potential remote code execution risks associated with direct GPU hardware access. While [ref:2] this trade-off highlights the security complexities of modern web standards, the performance impact is notable; early tests suggest that falling back to WebGL results in a measurable decrease in rendering fluidity for graphics-heavy sites like modern web-based mapping services.

Simultaneously, the Interop 2026 initiative is working to ensure that these advanced features remain consistent across all major engines—Blink, WebKit, and Gecko. The project recently refreshed its developer dashboard to prioritize improvements in mobile testing infrastructure and accessibility trees for GPU-rendered content. These collaborative efforts aim to eliminate the minor 'interop gaps' that still affect roughly 45% of devices currently operating in compatibility modes. As the industry moves toward 2027, the focus is expected to shift from core implementation to the optimization of AAA gaming engines and professional-grade video editing tools that leverage these low-level hardware hooks.

The widespread adoption of WebGPU is also reshaping the energy profile of mobile browsing. By utilizing modern GPU features like render bundles and temporary attachments, which minimize VRAM traffic, browser engines are now able to execute complex visuals with significantly less battery drain than the older WebGL standard. This convergence of compatibility, performance, and efficiency suggests that the web has finally become a competitive platform for high-end computing that rivals traditional desktop ecosystems.
timeline.summary_zh:
全球網絡生態系統本週達到了關鍵的穩定點，緊隨 Google Chrome 146 的穩定發佈之後，該版本引入了一個備受期待的 WebGPU 相容模式。這一發展標誌著該 API 的「生產就緒」狀態發生了重大轉變，因為它允許高性能圖形和計算應用程式運行在缺乏 Vulkan 或 Direct3D 12 等現代原生後端支援的舊有硬體上。通過提供可選擇的回退到 OpenGL 和 Direct3D 11 等舊有 API，瀏覽器供應商有效地填補了全球設備覆蓋率的剩餘空白，據估計本月活躍網絡用戶的總覆蓋率已超過 70%。

這最新技術里程碑緊隨今年早些時候瀏覽器引擎的更廣泛整合之後。2026 年 1 月，業界見證了跨平台拼圖的最後幾塊到位，Firefox 147 和 Safari 26 在 Windows、macOS 和 iOS 上預設啟用了 WebGPU。從長達十五年的 WebGL 時代轉向 WebGPU，現已得到主要利害關係者的一致認可。開發人員報告稱，對於計算密集型工作負載，性能提升高達 30 倍，尤其是在瀏覽器內 AI 推理方面，本地 GPU 執行速度已接近原生應用程式的 80%。這種效率催生了一系列「零安裝」的企業工具，包括數位孿生和複雜的 3D 模擬器，這些曾僅限於本地軟體環境。

在行動裝置方面，生態系統正在快速演變，但也面臨新的審查。雖然 WebGPU 現已在 iOS 26 和 Android 12 及更高版本上標準化，但 Google 已開始測試 Android 16 即將推出的版本中的 API 安全「終止開關」。此功能在進階保護模式設定中被發現，允許用戶禁用 WebGPU 以減輕與直接 GPU 硬體訪問相關的潛在遠端程式碼執行風險。雖然這種權衡凸顯了現代網絡標準的安全複雜性，但性能影響是顯著的；早期測試表明，回退到 WebGL 會導致像現代網絡地圖服務等圖形密集型網站的渲染流暢度出現可測量的下降。[ref:2]

同時，Interop 2026 計畫正致力於確保這些進階功能在所有主要引擎—Blink、WebKit 和 Gecko—之間保持一致。該計畫最近更新了其開發者儀表板，優先改進行動測試基礎設施和 GPU 渲染內容的輔助功能樹。這些協同努力旨在消除目前影響約 45% 處於相容模式下設備的少量「互通性差距」。隨著業界邁向 2027 年，焦點預計將從核心實現轉向利用這些低階硬體掛鉤的 AAA 遊戲引擎和專業級影片編輯工具的優化。

WebGPU 的廣泛採用也在重塑行動瀏覽的能源配置。通過利用現代 GPU 功能，如最小化 VRAM 流量的渲染綁定和臨時附件，瀏覽器引擎現在能夠以顯著低於舊有 WebGL 標準的電池消耗來執行複雜視覺效果。這種相容性、性能和效率的匯聚表明，網絡最終已成為一個高端計算的競爭性平台，可與傳統桌面生態系統媲美。

timeline.title: Browser Engines Secure 70% Global Compatibility Milestone for WebGPU and High-Performance Mobile Web
timeline.title_zh: 全球瀏覽器引擎統一 WebGPU 標準，Chrome 146 增強舊版硬件兼容性
