stories.label: Hong Kong Customs busts syndicate laundering four point seven billion drug dollars
stories.label_zh: 香港海關搗破洗黑錢四十七億毒品收益犯罪集團

timeline.title: Hong Kong Customs Uncovers Multi-Billion Dollar Syndicate Linking Massive Money Laundering to Drug Hub
timeline.title_zh: 香港海關破獲數十億港元洗錢集團，串聯大規模洗錢與毒品中心
timeline.sub_title: Authorities arrest two men and seize HK$4.7 billion in suspicious funds following operation Axis, exposing a sophisticated network involving shell companies and a secret narcotics distribution center.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 當局在「軸心行動」後逮捕兩名男子，並扣押 47 億港元可疑資金，揭露了一個涉及空殼公司及秘密毒品分銷中心的複雜網絡。
timeline.summary:
Hong Kong Customs has delivered a major blow to organized crime with the successful execution of operation Axis, an intensive enforcement action that dismantled a sophisticated money laundering syndicate. The operation resulted in the arrest of two local men and the discovery of approximately HK$4.7 billion in suspicious funds. [ref:1, 5, 2, 3, 4, 6, 10, 7, 8, 11] Investigators believe the network was heavily intertwined with a clandestine drug distribution business, marking one of the most significant financial crime busts in the city this year. The crackdown highlights the increasing complexity of criminal networks that utilize legitimate-looking business structures to mask the flow of illicit narcotics proceeds.

The investigation centered on a 66-year-old local man who served as the sole director and shareholder of two front companies. Between April 2022 and February 2026, these entities were used to process over 2,100 transactions involving funds of unknown origin. Authorities noted that the suspect's personal financial background was grossly incommensurate with the multi-billion dollar turnover recorded in his corporate bank accounts. To [ref:3, 2, 4] facilitate the laundering, the syndicate allegedly opened 38 accounts across six different local banks, utilizing shell companies and frequent transfers to obfuscate the paper trail. The [ref:9] largest single transfer during this period reportedly exceeded HK$31 million, illustrating the high volume of capital being moved through the system.

In a tactical follow-up search of a commercial premises associated with the companies, Customs officers uncovered a secret dangerous drugs packing and distribution center. A 36-year-old man, who claimed to be a mobile phone repairer, was arrested at the scene. This [ref:9] site functioned as a critical hub for the syndicate’s narcotics operations, serving as both a transit point for illegal substances and a facility for packaging. The seizure [ref:9] at this location was diverse, including cannabis buds, cannabis oil products, cocaine, methamphetamine, ketamine, and MDMA tablets. The estimated [ref:4, 11, 3, 2] market value of the narcotics seized is approximately HK$300,000, and officers also recovered a significant cache of drug packaging paraphernalia and inhalation apparatuses.

Beyond the financial and drug-related seizures, the raid yielded a large volume of physical evidence, including bank documents, mobile phones, bankbook counters, and cash. Additionally [ref:4, 2, 3, 9, 11], authorities confiscated approximately 9,000 duty-not-paid cigarettes and suspected nicotine oil, suggesting the syndicate was involved in various forms of smuggling and tax evasion. The sheer scale of the operation indicates a highly organized effort to integrate criminal proceeds into the formal economy through multiple layers of deception.

Customs officials have confirmed that the investigation remains active under several legal frameworks, including the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance and the Dangerous Drugs Ordinance. Under these laws, the maximum penalty for dealing with property known to represent the proceeds of an indictable offense is a fine of HK$5 million and 14 years' imprisonment. As financial [ref:3, 11] investigators continue to analyze the seized bank records and digital evidence, the likelihood of further arrests remains high. The department has reiterated its commitment to tracking the flow of drug money and dismantling the infrastructure that supports the global narcotics trade.
timeline.summary_zh:
香港海關透過成功執行「軸心行動」，一項旨在瓦解複雜洗錢集團的嚴厲執法行動，對有組織犯罪造成重大打擊。此次行動逮捕了兩名本地男子，並發現約 47 億港元的懷疑資金。調查人員相信，該網絡與一個秘密毒品分銷業務有著緊密的聯繫，這是今年本港最重大的金融犯罪案件之一。此次打擊行動凸顯了犯罪網絡日益複雜，它們利用看似合法的商業結構來掩蓋非法毒品收益的流動。[ref:1, 5, 2, 3, 4, 6, 10, 7, 8, 11]

調查重點集中在一名叫 66 歲的本地男子身上，他是一間空殼公司的唯一董事兼股東。在 2022 年 4 月至 2026 年 2 月期間，這些公司被用於處理超過 2,100 筆來源不明的資金交易。當局指出，該嫌疑人的個人財務狀況與其公司銀行帳戶記錄的數十億營業額嚴重不符。為方便洗錢，該集團據稱在六家本地銀行開設了 38 個帳戶，利用空殼公司和頻繁的轉帳來模糊交易記錄。據報導，此期間最大的單筆轉帳超過 3,100 萬港元，顯示了系統中流動的龐大資金量。[ref:3, 2, 4, 9]

在搜查與這些公司相關的商業場所後，海關人員發現了一個秘密的危險藥品包裝和分銷中心。一名 36 歲、自稱是手機維修工的男子當場被捕。該地點是該集團毒品交易的關鍵樞紐，既是非法藥品的轉運點，也是包裝設施。在此查獲的毒品種類繁多，包括大麻花、大麻油產品、可卡因、甲基苯丙胺、氯胺酮和 MDMA 藥片。查獲的毒品估計市價約為 30 萬港元，此外，警員還繳獲了大量毒品包裝工具和吸食器具。[ref:9, 4, 11, 3, 2]

除了金融和毒品相關的查獲品外，搜查還繳獲了大量實物證據，包括銀行文件、手機、銀行存摺和現金。此外，當局還沒收了約 9,000 支未完稅香煙及懷疑尼古丁油，這表明該集團涉嫌參與各種走私和逃稅活動。此次行動的規模之大，顯示了透過多層欺騙將犯罪所得整合到正規經濟中的高度有組織的努力。[ref:4, 2, 3, 9, 11]

海關官員已確認，調查仍在包括《有組織及嚴重罪行條例》和《危險藥物條例》在內的幾項法律框架下進行。根據這些法律，處理已知代表可起訴罪行收益的財產，最高可處以 500 萬港元罰款及 14 年監禁。隨著金融調查人員繼續分析查獲的銀行記錄和數字證據，進一步逮捕的可能性仍然很高。該部門重申其致力於追蹤毒品資金的流動，並瓦解支持全球毒品貿易的基礎設施。[ref:3, 11]

timeline.title: Hong Kong Customs Busts HK$4.7 Billion Money Laundering Syndicate Linked to Drug Trade
timeline.title_zh: 香港海關偵破毒品貿易相關的47億港元洗錢集團
timeline.sub_title: Authorities arrested two men as they dismantled a sophisticated criminal network that laundered billions in illicit proceeds through shell companies and a secret narcotics distribution hub.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 當局逮捕兩名男子，搗破一個透過空殼公司和秘密毒品分銷中心洗錢數十億非法所得的複雜犯罪網絡。
timeline.summary:
Hong Kong Customs successfully dismantled a massive money laundering syndicate in a high-stakes operation codenamed "Axis" on Wednesday. The crackdown led to the arrest of two local men and the uncovering of an intricate financial network that processed approximately HK$4.7 billion in suspicious funds over nearly four years. In addition to the financial crimes, investigators discovered and shut down a dangerous drug packing and distribution center that was being operated from a commercial building used by the syndicate.

The primary suspect, a 66-year-old local man, was apprehended for his alleged role in managing the immense flow of illicit capital. Financial investigators revealed that between April 2022 and February 2026, the individual utilized two company bank accounts to handle funds from unknown sources. The [ref:1] scale of the operation was vast, involving more than 2,100 transactions and connections to approximately 120 different companies. Authorities noted that the suspect’s personal and financial background was highly inconsistent with the enormous volume of money moving through these accounts, a red flag that originally triggered the deep-dive investigation.

Following the trail of the suspect companies, customs officers conducted a raid on a commercial premises that served as the syndicate’s base of operations. There, they [ref:1] uncovered a sophisticated drug distribution center and arrested a 36-year-old local man who was allegedly caught in the middle of operating the facility. The raid resulted [ref:1] in the seizure of a wide variety of dangerous drugs, including cannabis buds, cannabis oil products, cocaine, methamphetamine, ketamine, and MDMA tablets. The estimated [ref:1] market value of the seized narcotics is approximately HK$300,000.

Beyond the narcotics themselves, officers recovered a significant batch of drug packaging paraphernalia, inhalation apparatuses, and electronic equipment used to manage the illicit trade. The search also [ref:1] yielded roughly 9,000 duty-not-paid cigarettes and suspected nicotine oil. Cash, bank cards [ref:1], and a banknote counter were also seized from the site, providing further evidence of the high-volume cash transactions handled by the group. This dual-purpose [ref:1] facility highlights how organized crime groups in the region are increasingly using commercial fronts to mask both their physical drug operations and their financial laundering activities.

This operation marks one of the most significant busts for the department in recent months. Customs officials stated that the investigation remains ongoing under the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance and the Dangerous Drugs Ordinance, among other regulations. They warned that [ref:1] further arrests are highly likely as they continue to analyze bank records to trace the ultimate origin of the laundered billions and identify the wider network of individuals and companies involved. Under Hong Kong law, the maximum penalty for money laundering is 14 years in prison and a fine of HK$5 million, while drug trafficking can carry a sentence of life imprisonment.
timeline.summary_zh:
香港海關週三在一項代號為「Axis」的高風險行動中，成功搗破一個龐大的洗錢集團。此次打擊行動逮捕了兩名本地男子，並揭露了一個複雜的金融網絡，該網絡在近四年內處理了約47億港元的懷疑資金。除了金融犯罪外，調查人員還發現並關閉了一個由該集團運營的商業建築內的危險毒品包裝和分銷中心。
主要嫌疑人是一名66歲的本地男子，他因涉嫌管理巨額非法資金流動而被捕。財務調查人員透露，在2022年4月至2026年2月期間，該男子利用兩個公司銀行賬戶處理不明來源的資金。該行動規模龐大，涉及超過2,100筆交易，並與約120家不同公司有關聯。當局指出，該嫌疑人的個人和財務背景與這些賬戶之間的大量資金流動極不相符，這最初觸發了深入調查的警示信號。[ref:1]
順著嫌疑公司追蹤，海關人員突襲了一個作為該集團運營基地的商業場所。在那裡，他們發現了一個複雜的毒品分銷中心，並逮捕了一名36歲的本地男子，他被指控正在該場所內運營。此次突襲繳獲了種類繁多的危險毒品，包括大麻花、大麻油產品、可卡因、甲基苯丙胺、氯胺酮和MDMA藥片。查獲的毒品估計市價約為30萬港元。[ref:1]
除了毒品本身，海關人員還繳獲了大量的毒品包裝工具、吸食器具以及用於管理非法貿易的電子設備。搜查還發現了約9,000支應稅香煙和疑似尼古丁油。該地點還查獲了現金、銀行卡和點鈔機，進一步證明了該集團處理的大量現金交易。這種雙重用途的設施凸顯了該地區有組織犯罪集團如何越來越多地利用商業場所來掩蓋其毒品運營和洗錢活動。[ref:1]
此次行動是該部門近期最重大的突擊行動之一。海關官員表示，根據《有組織及嚴重罪行條例》和《危險藥物條例》等法規，調查仍在繼續。他們警告，隨著對銀行記錄的分析以追溯洗錢數十億資金的最終來源並識別更廣泛的個人和公司網絡，進一步逮捕的可能性極高。根據香港法律，洗錢的最高刑罰為監禁14年及罰款500萬港元，而販毒則可判處終身監禁。[ref:1]

stories.title: Hong Kong Customs Uncovers Multi-Billion Dollar Syndicate Linking Massive Money Laundering to Drug Hub
stories.title_zh: 香港海關破獲數十億港元洗錢集團，串聯大規模洗錢與毒品中心
stories.sub_title: Authorities arrest two men and seize HK$4.7 billion in suspicious funds following operation Axis, exposing a sophisticated network involving shell companies and a secret narcotics distribution center.
stories.sub_title_zh: 當局在「軸心行動」後逮捕兩名男子，並扣押 47 億港元可疑資金，揭露了一個涉及空殼公司及秘密毒品分銷中心的複雜網絡。
stories.summary:
Hong Kong Customs has delivered a major blow to organized crime with the successful execution of operation Axis, an intensive enforcement action that dismantled a sophisticated money laundering syndicate. The operation resulted in the arrest of two local men and the discovery of approximately HK$4.7 billion in suspicious funds. [ref:1, 5, 2, 3, 4, 6, 10, 7, 8, 11] Investigators believe the network was heavily intertwined with a clandestine drug distribution business, marking one of the most significant financial crime busts in the city this year. The crackdown highlights the increasing complexity of criminal networks that utilize legitimate-looking business structures to mask the flow of illicit narcotics proceeds.

The investigation centered on a 66-year-old local man who served as the sole director and shareholder of two front companies. Between April 2022 and February 2026, these entities were used to process over 2,100 transactions involving funds of unknown origin. Authorities noted that the suspect's personal financial background was grossly incommensurate with the multi-billion dollar turnover recorded in his corporate bank accounts. To [ref:3, 2, 4] facilitate the laundering, the syndicate allegedly opened 38 accounts across six different local banks, utilizing shell companies and frequent transfers to obfuscate the paper trail. The [ref:9] largest single transfer during this period reportedly exceeded HK$31 million, illustrating the high volume of capital being moved through the system.

In a tactical follow-up search of a commercial premises associated with the companies, Customs officers uncovered a secret dangerous drugs packing and distribution center. A 36-year-old man, who claimed to be a mobile phone repairer, was arrested at the scene. This [ref:9] site functioned as a critical hub for the syndicate’s narcotics operations, serving as both a transit point for illegal substances and a facility for packaging. The seizure [ref:9] at this location was diverse, including cannabis buds, cannabis oil products, cocaine, methamphetamine, ketamine, and MDMA tablets. The estimated [ref:4, 11, 3, 2] market value of the narcotics seized is approximately HK$300,000, and officers also recovered a significant cache of drug packaging paraphernalia and inhalation apparatuses.

Beyond the financial and drug-related seizures, the raid yielded a large volume of physical evidence, including bank documents, mobile phones, bankbook counters, and cash. Additionally [ref:4, 2, 3, 9, 11], authorities confiscated approximately 9,000 duty-not-paid cigarettes and suspected nicotine oil, suggesting the syndicate was involved in various forms of smuggling and tax evasion. The sheer scale of the operation indicates a highly organized effort to integrate criminal proceeds into the formal economy through multiple layers of deception.

Customs officials have confirmed that the investigation remains active under several legal frameworks, including the Organized and Serious Crimes Ordinance and the Dangerous Drugs Ordinance. Under these laws, the maximum penalty for dealing with property known to represent the proceeds of an indictable offense is a fine of HK$5 million and 14 years' imprisonment. As financial [ref:3, 11] investigators continue to analyze the seized bank records and digital evidence, the likelihood of further arrests remains high. The department has reiterated its commitment to tracking the flow of drug money and dismantling the infrastructure that supports the global narcotics trade.
stories.summary_zh:
香港海關透過成功執行「軸心行動」，一項旨在瓦解複雜洗錢集團的嚴厲執法行動，對有組織犯罪造成重大打擊。此次行動逮捕了兩名本地男子，並發現約 47 億港元的懷疑資金。調查人員相信，該網絡與一個秘密毒品分銷業務有著緊密的聯繫，這是今年本港最重大的金融犯罪案件之一。此次打擊行動凸顯了犯罪網絡日益複雜，它們利用看似合法的商業結構來掩蓋非法毒品收益的流動。[ref:1, 5, 2, 3, 4, 6, 10, 7, 8, 11]

調查重點集中在一名叫 66 歲的本地男子身上，他是一間空殼公司的唯一董事兼股東。在 2022 年 4 月至 2026 年 2 月期間，這些公司被用於處理超過 2,100 筆來源不明的資金交易。當局指出，該嫌疑人的個人財務狀況與其公司銀行帳戶記錄的數十億營業額嚴重不符。為方便洗錢，該集團據稱在六家本地銀行開設了 38 個帳戶，利用空殼公司和頻繁的轉帳來模糊交易記錄。據報導，此期間最大的單筆轉帳超過 3,100 萬港元，顯示了系統中流動的龐大資金量。[ref:3, 2, 4, 9]

在搜查與這些公司相關的商業場所後，海關人員發現了一個秘密的危險藥品包裝和分銷中心。一名 36 歲、自稱是手機維修工的男子當場被捕。該地點是該集團毒品交易的關鍵樞紐，既是非法藥品的轉運點，也是包裝設施。在此查獲的毒品種類繁多，包括大麻花、大麻油產品、可卡因、甲基苯丙胺、氯胺酮和 MDMA 藥片。查獲的毒品估計市價約為 30 萬港元，此外，警員還繳獲了大量毒品包裝工具和吸食器具。[ref:9, 4, 11, 3, 2]

除了金融和毒品相關的查獲品外，搜查還繳獲了大量實物證據，包括銀行文件、手機、銀行存摺和現金。此外，當局還沒收了約 9,000 支未完稅香煙及懷疑尼古丁油，這表明該集團涉嫌參與各種走私和逃稅活動。此次行動的規模之大，顯示了透過多層欺騙將犯罪所得整合到正規經濟中的高度有組織的努力。[ref:4, 2, 3, 9, 11]

海關官員已確認，調查仍在包括《有組織及嚴重罪行條例》和《危險藥物條例》在內的幾項法律框架下進行。根據這些法律，處理已知代表可起訴罪行收益的財產，最高可處以 500 萬港元罰款及 14 年監禁。隨著金融調查人員繼續分析查獲的銀行記錄和數字證據，進一步逮捕的可能性仍然很高。該部門重申其致力於追蹤毒品資金的流動，並瓦解支持全球毒品貿易的基礎設施。[ref:3, 11]

stories.label: Devastating landslides in Ethiopia leave fifty dead and trigger international aid response
stories.label_zh: 埃塞俄比亞毀滅性山泥傾瀉造成五十人死亡，引發國際援助響應

timeline.title: Ethiopia Landslide Death Toll Climbs to 107 as Rescue Teams Shift Focus to Recovery
timeline.title_zh: 衣索比亞山體滑坡死亡人數升至 107 人，救援隊轉為搜救殘骸
timeline.sub_title: Following torrential rains in the Gamo Zone, local authorities confirm mounting casualties and widespread displacement, shifting focus to humanitarian aid as the window for finding survivors closes.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 在加莫區（Gamo Zone）的滂沱大雨之後，地方當局確認傷亡人數不斷增加及大規模流離失所，隨著尋找生還者的時間窗口關閉，焦點轉向人道援助。
timeline.summary:
The death toll from the devastating landslides in southern Ethiopia’s Gamo Zone has climbed to 107 as of March 13, 2026, marking one of the most severe natural disasters to hit the region in recent years. Local authorities confirmed the updated figures after days of torrential seasonal rains triggered massive slope failures and flash floods across several districts in the South Ethiopia Regional State. The [ref:2] most severely impacted area is the Gacho Baba woreda, which has recorded 102 of the fatalities, with additional deaths reported in the neighboring districts of Bonke and Kamba.

Search and rescue operations, which have been active since the disaster first struck in the early morning hours of March 11, have now largely transitioned into a recovery phase. Local [ref:2] police commanders indicated that the window for rescuing survivors has now effectively passed, shifting the mission’s focus toward locating dozens of individuals who remain missing beneath the thick mud and debris. Recovery teams are facing immense logistical hurdles, as the heavy sludge has buried critical infrastructure and blocked access roads to remote hillside villages. Heavy [ref:1] machinery is being used to clear these pathways, but the work is slow and dangerous due to the ongoing risk of further soil instability and predicted light to moderate rainfall in the coming days.

The humanitarian impact of the disaster is vast. According to the Ethiopian Human Rights Commission, over 3,400 people have been displaced, while reports from relief agencies suggest that approximately 1,950 households have been affected in total. Entire kebeles, including Mazo Doisa, Kuyile, and Laka, have seen homes, farmlands, and livestock swept away, leaving thousands of residents without their primary means of survival. Displaced families are currently seeking refuge in churches and other public spaces, often in overcrowded conditions that lack basic necessities.

In response to the escalating crisis, international and national organizations have accelerated their mobilization efforts. The World Health Organization has activated an emergency task team and deployed rapid response units to provide medical support and prevent the outbreak of waterborne diseases. Simultaneously, the Ethiopian Red Cross Society has deployed staff and ambulances to the Gamo Zone to deliver food, non-food items, and essential health services. The Ethiopian [ref:8] Human Rights Commission has called for a rights-based emergency response, emphasizing that authorities must ensure the safety and dignity of the survivors while addressing the severe loss of life and property.

This tragedy has reignited a national conversation regarding Ethiopia’s vulnerability to climate-related disasters, particularly in highland regions prone to landslides. Tilahun Kebede, the president of the South Ethiopia Regional State, has issued urgent warnings to communities living in flood-prone areas, advising them to move to higher ground as the seasonal rains persist. The current disaster [ref:3, 7, 5, 4, 6, 9] echoes a catastrophic landslide in the neighboring Gofa Zone in 2024, highlighting a recurring pattern of climate risk that necessitates more robust disaster risk management and long-term mitigation strategies to protect vulnerable populations.
timeline.summary_zh:
截至 2026 年 3 月 13 日，衣索比亞南部加莫區（Gamo Zone）毀滅性山體滑坡的死亡人數已升至 107 人，成為該地區近年來最嚴重的自然災害之一。地方當局在連日滂沱的季節性降雨引發南部衣索比亞地區數個縣的嚴重斜坡崩塌和洪水後，確認了最新數字。受影響最嚴重的地區是 Gacho Baba woreda，記錄了 102 人死亡，鄰近的 Bonke 和 Kamba 縣也有死亡報告。[ref:2]

自 3 月 11 日清晨災難首次發生以來，搜救行動已基本轉入清理階段。當地警方指揮官表示，尋找生還者的時間窗口已基本過去，任務重點已轉向尋找數十名失蹤者，他們被埋在厚厚的泥漿和瓦礫之下。由於大量泥漿掩埋了關鍵基礎設施並阻斷了通往偏遠山村的道路，搜救隊正麵臨巨大的後勤挑戰。重型機械正在被用於清理道路，但由於持續的土壤不穩定風險以及預計未來幾天會有中低雨量，這項工作進展緩慢且危險。[ref:2, 1]

此次災害的人道影響巨大。根據衣索比亞人權委員會的數據，超過 3,400 人流離失所，而救援機構的報告顯示，總共有約 1,950 戶家庭受到影響。Mazo Doisa、Kuyile 和 Laka 等整個行政村的房屋、農田和牲畜被沖走，使數千名居民失去主要的生計來源。流離失所的家庭目前在教堂和其他公共場所避難，條件通常擁擠且缺乏基本必需品。

為應對不斷升級的危機，國際和國家組織已加快了動員力度。世界衛生組織已啟動一個緊急工作組，並部署了快速反應小組，以提供醫療支援並預防水傳播疾病的爆發。同時，衣索比亞紅十字會已向加莫區派遣了工作人員和救護車，以運送食品、非食品物品和基本衛生服務。衣索比亞人權委員會呼籲採取以權利為基礎的應急響應，強調當局必須確保生還者的安全和尊嚴，同時處理嚴重的生命和財產損失。[ref:8]

這場悲劇重新引發了全國範圍對衣索比亞對氣候相關災難脆弱性的討論，特別是易發生山體滑坡的高地地區。南衣索比亞地區主席 Tilahun Kebede 已發出緊急警告，提醒居住在易洪泛區的社區，隨著季節性降雨持續，應遷移到地勢較高的地方。目前的災難與 2024 年鄰近的 Gofa 區發生的災難性山體滑坡事件遙相呼應，凸顯了一種重複出現的氣候風險模式，需要更強有力的災難風險管理和長期緩解策略來保護脆弱人口。[ref:3, 7, 5, 4, 6, 9]

timeline.title: Death Toll Reaches 102 as Search Operations Intensify Following Ethiopian Gamo Zone Landslides
timeline.title_zh: 埃塞俄比亞加莫地區山體滑坡後，死亡人數升至102人，搜救行動加強
timeline.sub_title: Severe landslides triggered by persistent rainfall in southern Ethiopia's Gamo Zone have claimed over 100 lives, prompting a massive regional emergency response and urgent evacuation orders for highland residents.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 埃塞俄比亞南部加莫地區持續降雨引發的嚴重山體滑坡已造成逾百人死亡，促使大規模區域緊急響應和針對高原居民的緊急疏散令。
timeline.summary:
Rescue operations in southern Ethiopia have intensified as the confirmed death toll from devastating landslides in the Gamo Zone rose to at least 102 people on Thursday. The disaster, which struck overnight on March 11 following a week of relentless heavy rainfall, primarily impacted the Gacho Baba, Kamba, and Bonke districts. Local officials reported that while 52 bodies have been recovered from the thick mud and debris, approximately 50 to 125 other individuals remain missing, buried under the collapsed slopes of the region's highlands.

The scale of the catastrophe has overwhelmed local communities, where residents and emergency teams have been seen digging through mounds of earth, sometimes with bare hands, to reach those trapped. Gamo Zone director of disaster response, Mesfin Manuqa, confirmed that at least one survivor was pulled alive from the mud during early rescue efforts, though hopes for finding more survivors are fading as the search enters its second day. The landslides have caused significant logistical challenges, with mudslides blocking arterial roads and floodwaters submerging bridges, effectively isolating several remote hillside villages from immediate aid.

In response to the crisis, Tilahun Kebede, the president of the South Ethiopia Regional State, has mobilized an emergency task force to coordinate relief efforts and long-term rehabilitation. Heavy machinery is being deployed to clear debris from critical transport routes to allow for the delivery of food, medicine, and temporary shelter. Regional [ref:1] authorities have also issued an urgent call for residents in high-risk highland areas to evacuate to safer, lower ground, warning that saturated soil conditions make further slope collapses highly likely as the rainy season continues.

International and local aid agencies, including the Ethiopian Red Cross Society, are currently supporting the government’s efforts by providing initial relief supplies. Meteorologists and environmental experts note that the increasing frequency of such extreme weather events in East Africa is consistent with climate change patterns, which have intensified seasonal downpours across the region. This latest [ref:3] tragedy evokes memories of the July 2024 landslides in the neighboring Gofa Zone, which killed over 200 people, underscoring the persistent vulnerability of Ethiopia's mountainous regions to climate-driven disasters.
timeline.summary_zh:
週四，埃塞俄比亞南部搜救行動加強，加莫地區毀滅性山體滑坡的確認死亡人數已上升至至少102人。這場災難發生於3月11日夜間，此前已有近一週的持續強降雨，主要影響了Gacho Baba、Kamba和Bonke地區。當地官員報告稱，已從厚厚的泥漿和瓦礫中挖出52具屍體，但仍有約50至125人失蹤，埋藏在該地區高原的山坡下。
災難規模已壓垮當地社區，居民和緊急救援隊伍徒手挖掘土堆，試圖營救被困人員。加莫地區災難響應主管Mesfin Manuqa證實，在早期搜救行動中，至少有一名倖存者被從泥漿中救出，但隨著搜救進入第二天，找到更多倖存者的希望日益渺茫。山體滑坡造成了嚴重的後勤挑戰，泥石流阻斷了主要道路，洪水淹沒了橋樑，實際上將幾個偏遠的山區村莊與外界隔絕，無法獲得及時援助。[ref:1]
為應對危機，南埃塞俄比亞地區州州長Tilahun Kebede已調動一支應急特遣隊，協調救濟工作和長期恢復。重型機械正被部署以清除關鍵運輸路線上的瓦礫，以便運送食物、藥品和臨時住所。地區當局還發布了緊急呼籲，要求在高風險高原地區的居民疏散到更安全、更低的地勢，並警告由於土壤飽和，隨著雨季的繼續，山體滑坡的可能性非常大。[ref:3]
國際和當地援助機構，包括埃塞俄俄紅十字會，目前正在為政府的努力提供初步援助物資。氣象學家和環境專家指出，東非地區此類極端天氣事件的頻率越來越高，與氣候變化模式一致，這些模式加劇了該地區的季節性降雨。這一最新的悲劇讓人們回想起2024年7月鄰近Gofa地區發生的造成200多人死亡的山體滑坡，凸顯了埃塞俄比亞山區對氣候驅動的災難持續存在的脆弱性。

stories.title: Ethiopia Landslide Death Toll Climbs to 107 as Rescue Teams Shift Focus to Recovery
stories.title_zh: 衣索比亞山體滑坡死亡人數升至 107 人，救援隊轉為搜救殘骸
stories.sub_title: Following torrential rains in the Gamo Zone, local authorities confirm mounting casualties and widespread displacement, shifting focus to humanitarian aid as the window for finding survivors closes.
stories.sub_title_zh: 在加莫區（Gamo Zone）的滂沱大雨之後，地方當局確認傷亡人數不斷增加及大規模流離失所，隨著尋找生還者的時間窗口關閉，焦點轉向人道援助。
stories.summary:
The death toll from the devastating landslides in southern Ethiopia’s Gamo Zone has climbed to 107 as of March 13, 2026, marking one of the most severe natural disasters to hit the region in recent years. Local authorities confirmed the updated figures after days of torrential seasonal rains triggered massive slope failures and flash floods across several districts in the South Ethiopia Regional State. The [ref:2] most severely impacted area is the Gacho Baba woreda, which has recorded 102 of the fatalities, with additional deaths reported in the neighboring districts of Bonke and Kamba.

Search and rescue operations, which have been active since the disaster first struck in the early morning hours of March 11, have now largely transitioned into a recovery phase. Local [ref:2] police commanders indicated that the window for rescuing survivors has now effectively passed, shifting the mission’s focus toward locating dozens of individuals who remain missing beneath the thick mud and debris. Recovery teams are facing immense logistical hurdles, as the heavy sludge has buried critical infrastructure and blocked access roads to remote hillside villages. Heavy [ref:1] machinery is being used to clear these pathways, but the work is slow and dangerous due to the ongoing risk of further soil instability and predicted light to moderate rainfall in the coming days.

The humanitarian impact of the disaster is vast. According to the Ethiopian Human Rights Commission, over 3,400 people have been displaced, while reports from relief agencies suggest that approximately 1,950 households have been affected in total. Entire kebeles, including Mazo Doisa, Kuyile, and Laka, have seen homes, farmlands, and livestock swept away, leaving thousands of residents without their primary means of survival. Displaced families are currently seeking refuge in churches and other public spaces, often in overcrowded conditions that lack basic necessities.

In response to the escalating crisis, international and national organizations have accelerated their mobilization efforts. The World Health Organization has activated an emergency task team and deployed rapid response units to provide medical support and prevent the outbreak of waterborne diseases. Simultaneously, the Ethiopian Red Cross Society has deployed staff and ambulances to the Gamo Zone to deliver food, non-food items, and essential health services. The Ethiopian [ref:8] Human Rights Commission has called for a rights-based emergency response, emphasizing that authorities must ensure the safety and dignity of the survivors while addressing the severe loss of life and property.

This tragedy has reignited a national conversation regarding Ethiopia’s vulnerability to climate-related disasters, particularly in highland regions prone to landslides. Tilahun Kebede, the president of the South Ethiopia Regional State, has issued urgent warnings to communities living in flood-prone areas, advising them to move to higher ground as the seasonal rains persist. The current disaster [ref:3, 7, 5, 4, 6, 9] echoes a catastrophic landslide in the neighboring Gofa Zone in 2024, highlighting a recurring pattern of climate risk that necessitates more robust disaster risk management and long-term mitigation strategies to protect vulnerable populations.
stories.summary_zh:
截至 2026 年 3 月 13 日，衣索比亞南部加莫區（Gamo Zone）毀滅性山體滑坡的死亡人數已升至 107 人，成為該地區近年來最嚴重的自然災害之一。地方當局在連日滂沱的季節性降雨引發南部衣索比亞地區數個縣的嚴重斜坡崩塌和洪水後，確認了最新數字。受影響最嚴重的地區是 Gacho Baba woreda，記錄了 102 人死亡，鄰近的 Bonke 和 Kamba 縣也有死亡報告。[ref:2]

自 3 月 11 日清晨災難首次發生以來，搜救行動已基本轉入清理階段。當地警方指揮官表示，尋找生還者的時間窗口已基本過去，任務重點已轉向尋找數十名失蹤者，他們被埋在厚厚的泥漿和瓦礫之下。由於大量泥漿掩埋了關鍵基礎設施並阻斷了通往偏遠山村的道路，搜救隊正麵臨巨大的後勤挑戰。重型機械正在被用於清理道路，但由於持續的土壤不穩定風險以及預計未來幾天會有中低雨量，這項工作進展緩慢且危險。[ref:2, 1]

此次災害的人道影響巨大。根據衣索比亞人權委員會的數據，超過 3,400 人流離失所，而救援機構的報告顯示，總共有約 1,950 戶家庭受到影響。Mazo Doisa、Kuyile 和 Laka 等整個行政村的房屋、農田和牲畜被沖走，使數千名居民失去主要的生計來源。流離失所的家庭目前在教堂和其他公共場所避難，條件通常擁擠且缺乏基本必需品。

為應對不斷升級的危機，國際和國家組織已加快了動員力度。世界衛生組織已啟動一個緊急工作組，並部署了快速反應小組，以提供醫療支援並預防水傳播疾病的爆發。同時，衣索比亞紅十字會已向加莫區派遣了工作人員和救護車，以運送食品、非食品物品和基本衛生服務。衣索比亞人權委員會呼籲採取以權利為基礎的應急響應，強調當局必須確保生還者的安全和尊嚴，同時處理嚴重的生命和財產損失。[ref:8]

這場悲劇重新引發了全國範圍對衣索比亞對氣候相關災難脆弱性的討論，特別是易發生山體滑坡的高地地區。南衣索比亞地區主席 Tilahun Kebede 已發出緊急警告，提醒居住在易洪泛區的社區，隨著季節性降雨持續，應遷移到地勢較高的地方。目前的災難與 2024 年鄰近的 Gofa 區發生的災難性山體滑坡事件遙相呼應，凸顯了一種重複出現的氣候風險模式，需要更強有力的災難風險管理和長期緩解策略來保護脆弱人口。[ref:3, 7, 5, 4, 6, 9]

stories.label: Authorities investigate fatal campus tragedy at Old Dominion University in Virginia
stories.label_zh: 當局調查維珍尼亞州舊嶺大學致命校園悲劇

timeline.title: Federal Authorities Charge Virginia Man for Illegal Gun Sale as ODU Mourns Fallen Instructor
timeline.title_zh: 聯邦當局起訴維珍尼亞州男子非法槍械銷售案，奧爾德姆大學哀悼殉職教官
timeline.sub_title: Federal investigators have arrested a man for selling the stolen firearm used in Thursday's fatal campus shooting, as the university community honors the sacrifice of Lt. Col. Brandon Shah.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 聯邦調查人員已逮捕一名男子，他涉嫌銷售週四校園槍擊案中使用的贓物槍枝，同時大學社群正哀悼布蘭登·沙上校的犧牲。
timeline.summary:
Federal investigators announced the arrest of a Smithfield, Virginia, man on Friday in connection with the fatal shooting at Old Dominion University, as the campus community continues to reel from the targeted act of violence. Kenya Mcchell Chapman, 32, faces multiple federal charges including dealing in firearms without a license and making false statements during firearm purchases. [ref:2] Authorities allege that Chapman sold a stolen handgun to the gunman, Mohamed Bailor Jalloh, just days before the attack. [ref:2] The firearm had been reported stolen from a vehicle in Newport News a year prior, and its serial number had been obliterated to hinder tracing efforts. This legal development highlights a significant security breach, as Jalloh was legally barred from possessing weapons due to a 2017 terrorism conviction for attempting to support ISIS.

The Old Dominion University community is formally mourning the loss of 42-year-old Lt. Col. Brandon Shah, the university’s chair of military science and a decorated Army veteran. University President Brian Hemphill described Shah as a heroic protector and a shining example who embodied the spirit of service until his final moments inside Constant Hall. Shah [ref:1], an ODU alumnus who returned to lead the ROTC program in 2022, had a distinguished military career as a helicopter pilot with deployments to Iraq, Afghanistan, and Eastern Europe. He is [ref:6] survived by his wife and child. Two [ref:1] other individuals affiliated with the Army ROTC program were also struck by gunfire during the assault; one victim remains in critical condition at Sentara Norfolk General Hospital, while a third person was treated and released after seeking care at a nearby emergency department.

New details from the investigation have shed light on the extraordinary bravery displayed by students during the life-threatening crisis. FBI officials confirmed that Jalloh entered the classroom on Thursday morning and twice asked those present to confirm they were part of an ROTC class. After receiving confirmation, he reportedly shouted “Allahu Akbar” and opened fire. In the immediate [ref:9, 8] chaos, several ROTC cadets reportedly charged the gunman to prevent further casualties. During the [ref:4] intense physical struggle, a student fatally stabbed Jalloh with a knife. Special Agent in Charge Dominique Evans of the FBI’s Norfolk field office stated that the cadets’ extreme bravery and courage undoubtedly saved dozens of lives. Law enforcement confirmed that Jalloh was not shot by responding officers but was killed during the confrontation with students.

The Federal Bureau of Investigation is leading the ongoing probe, which is officially being treated as an act of terrorism. FBI Director Kash [ref:5, 3] Patel stated that a dedicated task force is working around the clock to determine if Jalloh had any accomplices or external support networks. Jalloh’s background as a former Virginia National Guardsman who had previously served time for attempting to support extremist groups has raised sharp questions about his early release from prison in late 2024 and the supervision he received thereafter. In response to the tragedy, ODU has suspended all operations and canceled classes through Friday. Counseling and support [ref:8, 7, 6] services have been mobilized for the university's 24,000 students, a large portion of whom have direct ties to the military.
timeline.summary_zh:
聯邦調查人員週五宣布，在維珍尼亞州史密斯菲爾德逮捕了一名男子，該男子與舊奧爾德姆大學的致命槍擊案有關，而大學社群仍在從這起針對性的暴力事件中恢復。32歲的 Kenya Mcchell Chapman 面臨多項聯邦指控，包括無證銷售槍械和在購買槍械時作出虛假陳述。當局指控 Chapman 在襲擊前幾天將一支贓物手槍賣給了槍手 Mohamed Bailor Jalloh。該槍枝一年前在紐波特紐斯的一輛汽車中被報失竊，其序號已被塗抹以妨礙追蹤。這項法律發展凸顯了嚴重的安全漏洞，因為 Jalloh 因企圖支持伊斯蘭國而被判有罪，於 2017 年被定罪，依法禁止持有武器。[ref:2]

舊奧爾德姆大學社群正正式哀悼 42 歲的布蘭登·沙上校的逝世，他是該大學軍事科學系主任及一名受勳的陸軍退伍軍人。大學校長 Brian Hemphill 形容沙上校是一位英勇的保護者和光輝的榜樣，他一生都在 Constant Hall 內體現了服務精神。沙上校是 ODU 的校友，於 2022 年回校領導預備軍官訓練團（ROTC）計畫，他擁有輝煌的軍旅生涯，擔任直升機飛行員，曾派駐伊拉克、阿富汗和東歐。他由妻子和孩子撫養。在襲擊中，兩名與陸軍 ROTC 計畫有關的個人也受到槍擊；一名受害者仍在 Sentara Norfolk General Hospital 情況危急，而第三人接受治療後已出院。[ref:1, 6]

調查的新細節揭示了學生在危及生命的危機中所展現的非凡勇氣。聯邦調查局官員證實，Jalloh 於週四上午進入教室，兩次詢問在場人員是否為 ROTC 學員。在得到確認後，他據報大喊「真主至大」（Allahu Akbar）並開火。在最初的混亂中，據報有幾名 ROTC 學員衝向槍手以阻止更多傷亡。在激烈的搏鬥中，一名學生用刀將 Jalloh 刺死。聯邦調查局諾福克辦事處的特別探員主管 Dominique Evans 表示，學員們的極端勇氣和膽識無疑拯救了數十人的生命。執法部門證實，Jalloh 並非由應對的警官擊斃，而是在與學生的對抗中喪生。[ref:9, 8, 4]

聯邦調查局正在領導持續的調查，該調查被正式視為恐怖主義行為。聯邦調查局局長 Kash Patel 表示，一個專門的特別工作組正在全天候工作，以確定 Jalloh 是否有任何同夥或外部支援網絡。Jalloh 曾是維珍尼亞州國民警衛隊成員，並曾因企圖支持極端組織而服刑的背景，這引發了對他於 2024 年底提前獲釋及之後所受監管的尖銳質疑。為應對此次悲劇，ODU 已暫停所有業務，並取消了週五的課程。大學為其 24,000 名學生提供了心理諮詢和支援服務，其中大部分學生與軍方有直接聯繫。[ref:5, 3, 8, 7, 6]

timeline.title: Fatal Shooting at Old Dominion University Investigated as Terrorism After Gunman with ISIS Ties Subdued
timeline.title_zh: 舊ありました大學發生致命槍擊事件，槍手有ISIS聯繫，警方初步調查為恐怖襲擊
timeline.sub_title: Authorities launched a federal terrorism investigation after a gunman killed a retired military instructor and wounded two ROTC students before being neutralized by courageous students in a campus classroom.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 在一名槍手在校園教室裡殺死一名退休軍事教官並打傷兩名預備役軍官學生後，當局啟動了聯邦恐怖主義調查。
timeline.summary:
A horrific act of violence unfolded Thursday morning at Old Dominion University in Norfolk, Virginia, leaving one victim and the gunman dead. The shooting occurred shortly before 10:49 a.m. inside Constant Hall, the home of the university’s business school and a central hub for student activity. According to campus police and federal investigators, the gunman entered a classroom and targeted members of the Army Reserve Officers' Training Corps (ROTC). The instructor, a retired military officer whose identity has not yet been formally released, was fatally shot while two students sustained critical injuries.

The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) has identified the shooter as 36-year-old Mohamed Bailor Jalloh, a former Army National Guardsman with a documented history of radicalization. FBI officials confirmed that the incident is being investigated as an act of terrorism, noting that Jalloh shouted “Allahu Akbar” before opening fire. Jalloh was [ref:1, 2, 9] previously known to federal authorities, having been convicted in 2016 for providing material support to ISIS. He was sentenced [ref:3, 6] to 11 years in federal prison and had recently been released from custody in December 2024.

The death toll could have been significantly higher if not for the rapid and heroic intervention of the students in the classroom. Witnesses [ref:6] and officials reported that after Jalloh opened fire, several ROTC students utilized their training to confront the attacker. FBI Director Kash Patel praised the “brave students” who stepped in to subdue the gunman, preventing further casualties before law enforcement could arrive. While initial [ref:6, 1] reports were unclear regarding how the shooter died, investigators later confirmed that students successfully neutralized him during the struggle. One student reportedly [ref:2] used a knife to stop the threat, and authorities noted the gunman was not killed by police fire.

Following the shooting, the university immediately issued a “Run-Hide-Fight” alert and placed the campus on lockdown. By approximately 11:43 a.m., university police declared that there was no longer an active threat. Two of the wounded victims [ref:3] were rushed to Sentara Norfolk General Hospital, where they remain in critical but stable condition. A third victim was treated [ref:7, 1] at a freestanding emergency department in Virginia Beach and has since been released. All three victims were [ref:9, 5, 6, 1] confirmed to have direct affiliations with the university’s military programs.

Old Dominion University President Brian Hemphill described the day as a “tragedy” and announced that all classes and campus operations would remain suspended through Friday to allow the community to grieve and for investigators to process the scene. Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger stated that state resources are being fully mobilized to support the university and local law enforcement. Federal agents from the Bureau [ref:3] of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) are working alongside the FBI to determine how Jalloh obtained the weapon used in the attack and whether he acted alone. Counseling services have been made available for all students and staff as the campus begins the long process of recovery.
timeline.summary_zh:
週四上午，維吉尼亞州諾福克市的舊ありました大學發生了一起駭人的暴力事件，導致一名受害者和槍手死亡。槍擊事件發生在上午10:49之前，地點在Constant Hall，該建築是大學商學院所在地，也是學生活動的中心。根據校園警察和聯邦調查人員的說法，槍手進入一間教室，目標是陸軍預備役軍官訓練隊（ROTC）的成員。一名退休軍官教官，其身份尚未正式公布，在槍擊中喪生，另有兩名學生受重傷。[ref:1, 2, 9, 3, 6]
聯邦調查局（FBI）已確認槍手為36歲的Mohamed Bailor Jalloh，他曾是國民警衛隊成員，並有激進化記錄。FBI官員證實，此事件正作為一起恐怖襲擊進行調查，並指出Jalloh在開槍前曾高喊「真主至大」。Jalloh先前已知悉於聯邦當局，曾於2016年因向ISIS提供實質性支持而被定罪。他被判處11年聯邦監禁，並於2024年12月近期獲釋。[ref:6, 1, 2]
如果不是教室裡學生的快速而英勇的干預，死亡人數可能會更高。目擊者和官員報告說，在Jalloh開槍後，幾名ROTC學生利用他們的訓練與襲擊者對抗。FBI局長Kash Patel讚揚了「勇敢的學生」，他們在執法人員到達之前出手制服了槍手，阻止了更多傷亡。儘管初步報告對槍手如何死亡的說法不一，但調查人員後來證實，學生們在搏鬥中成功將其制服。據報導，一名學生用刀阻止了威脅，當局指出槍手並非死於警察的槍火。[ref:6, 1, 2]
槍擊事件發生後，大學立即發布了「跑-躲-反擊」警報，並將校園封鎖。大約在上午11:43，校園警察宣布已無活躍威脅。兩名受傷的受害者被送往Sentara Norfolk General Hospital，目前情況危急但穩定。第三名受害者在弗吉尼亞海灘的一家獨立急診室接受治療，現已出院。所有三名受害者均確認與大學的軍事項目有直接聯繫。[ref:3, 7, 1, 9, 5, 6]
舊ありました大學校長Brian Hemphill稱這一天是「一場悲劇」，並宣布所有課程和校園活動將暫停至週五，以便社區能夠哀悼並讓調查人員處理現場。維吉尼亞州州長Abigail Spanberger表示，州政府資源將全面動員，以支持大學和當地執法部門。來自菸酒槍械及爆炸物管理局（ATF）的聯邦探員正與FBI合作，確定Jalloh如何獲得用於襲擊的武器，以及他是否單獨行動。隨著校園開始漫長的恢復過程，現已為所有學生和教職員工提供心理輔導服務。[ref:3]

stories.summary_zh:
聯邦調查人員週五宣布，在維珍尼亞州史密斯菲爾德逮捕了一名男子，該男子與舊奧爾德姆大學的致命槍擊案有關，而大學社群仍在從這起針對性的暴力事件中恢復。32歲的 Kenya Mcchell Chapman 面臨多項聯邦指控，包括無證銷售槍械和在購買槍械時作出虛假陳述。當局指控 Chapman 在襲擊前幾天將一支贓物手槍賣給了槍手 Mohamed Bailor Jalloh。該槍枝一年前在紐波特紐斯的一輛汽車中被報失竊，其序號已被塗抹以妨礙追蹤。這項法律發展凸顯了嚴重的安全漏洞，因為 Jalloh 因企圖支持伊斯蘭國而被判有罪，於 2017 年被定罪，依法禁止持有武器。[ref:2]

舊奧爾德姆大學社群正正式哀悼 42 歲的布蘭登·沙上校的逝世，他是該大學軍事科學系主任及一名受勳的陸軍退伍軍人。大學校長 Brian Hemphill 形容沙上校是一位英勇的保護者和光輝的榜樣，他一生都在 Constant Hall 內體現了服務精神。沙上校是 ODU 的校友，於 2022 年回校領導預備軍官訓練團（ROTC）計畫，他擁有輝煌的軍旅生涯，擔任直升機飛行員，曾派駐伊拉克、阿富汗和東歐。他由妻子和孩子撫養。在襲擊中，兩名與陸軍 ROTC 計畫有關的個人也受到槍擊；一名受害者仍在 Sentara Norfolk General Hospital 情況危急，而第三人接受治療後已出院。[ref:1, 6]

調查的新細節揭示了學生在危及生命的危機中所展現的非凡勇氣。聯邦調查局官員證實，Jalloh 於週四上午進入教室，兩次詢問在場人員是否為 ROTC 學員。在得到確認後，他據報大喊「真主至大」（Allahu Akbar）並開火。在最初的混亂中，據報有幾名 ROTC 學員衝向槍手以阻止更多傷亡。在激烈的搏鬥中，一名學生用刀將 Jalloh 刺死。聯邦調查局諾福克辦事處的特別探員主管 Dominique Evans 表示，學員們的極端勇氣和膽識無疑拯救了數十人的生命。執法部門證實，Jalloh 並非由應對的警官擊斃，而是在與學生的對抗中喪生。[ref:9, 8, 4]

聯邦調查局正在領導持續的調查，該調查被正式視為恐怖主義行為。聯邦調查局局長 Kash Patel 表示，一個專門的特別工作組正在全天候工作，以確定 Jalloh 是否有任何同夥或外部支援網絡。Jalloh 曾是維珍尼亞州國民警衛隊成員，並曾因企圖支持極端組織而服刑的背景，這引發了對他於 2024 年底提前獲釋及之後所受監管的尖銳質疑。為應對此次悲劇，ODU 已暫停所有業務，並取消了週五的課程。大學為其 24,000 名學生提供了心理諮詢和支援服務，其中大部分學生與軍方有直接聯繫。[ref:5, 3, 8, 7, 6]

stories.label: Bangladesh Parliament reconvenes following civil uprising to establish new political order
stories.label_zh: 孟加拉國會繼內亂後重開，建立新政治秩序

timeline.title: Bangladesh’s 13th Parliament Convenes as Prime Minister Tarique Rahman Pledges Hub for National Problem-Solving
timeline.title_zh: 孟加拉國第 13 屆議會召開，總理 Tarique Rahman 承諾成為國家問題解決中心
timeline.sub_title: Marking a transition from interim rule, the newly elected legislature begins reviewing 133 reform ordinances while navigating complex political tensions between the BNP-led government and student-backed opposition groups.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 新選出的立法機構標誌著從臨時統治過渡，開始審查 133 項改革法令，同時應對孟加拉國民族主義黨政府與學生支持的Opposition Groups之間複雜的政治緊張局勢。
timeline.summary:
The 13th Jatiya Sangsad of Bangladesh held its maiden session on Thursday, March 12, 2026, marking a historic return to elected governance following the 2024 civil uprising and a subsequent 18-month interim period. Prime Minister Tarique Rahman, leading the Bangladesh Nationalist Party (BNP) to a landslide victory in the February 12 general elections, addressed the house with a vision to transform the parliament into the central hub for resolving the nation’s deepest challenges. The reconvening of the legislature is seen as a critical milestone in stabilizing a country that has endured significant political upheaval since the ouster of the previous administration.

One of the most immediate tasks facing the new parliament is the fate of 133 ordinances promulgated during the interim administration led by Nobel laureate Muhammad Yunus. These measures, covering a broad spectrum from banking reforms and criminal law to constitutional restructuring, were formally placed before the house on Thursday. Under the constitution, lawmakers have 30 days to ratify, amend, or reject these ordinances, or they will lose legal validity. To manage [ref:3] this intensive legislative burden, the government has proposed the formation of a special committee comprising members from both the treasury and opposition benches to scrutinize the reforms and determine which should be permanently encoded into law.

The internal leadership of the house was also established during the opening sessions. Hafiz Uddin Ahmad and Kayser Kamal, both members of the BNP, were elected as Speaker and Deputy Speaker, respectively. The BNP [ref:6, 4]-led alliance holds a commanding two-thirds majority with 212 seats, providing the government with significant legislative leverage. However, the political landscape remains far from uniform. The opposition [ref:2, 1, 5] is led by Shafiqur Rahman of the Jamaat-e-Islami-led alliance, which secured 76 seats, and includes the newly formed National Citizen Party (NCP), established by the student leaders who spearheaded the July uprising.

Tensions within the chamber became evident during the address of President Mohammed Shahabuddin. While BNP lawmakers expressed support for the President's speech, representatives from Jamaat-e-Islami and the NCP staged a walkout. The NCP has [ref:5] specifically called for the President’s impeachment, citing his appointment under the previous regime, though he remains in office for the sake of constitutional continuity. This friction [ref:5] highlights the ongoing struggle between traditional political forces and the younger generation of activists who demand deeper structural changes beyond the restoration of the parliamentary system.

Economically, the new government inherits a nation at a crossroads. Prime Minister Rahman emphasized the need to revitalize a sluggish economy burdened by high inflation and unemployment, compounded by global energy pressures. The "Bangladesh First" foreign policy platform was also highlighted, signaling a shift toward strategic autonomy and a recalibration of regional alliances. As the parliament [ref:2] begins its work, the focus remains on whether this new political order can effectively balance the demands for justice for the 2024 uprising's martyrs with the pragmatic requirements of governing a nation of 170 million people.
timeline.summary_zh:
孟加拉國第 13 屆國民議會於 2026 年 3 月 12 日星期四召開了首次會議，標誌著在 2024 年的民眾起義和隨後的 18 個月臨時時期之後，民選政府歷史性地回歸。由孟加拉國民族主義黨（BNP）領導的總理 Tarique Rahman 在 2 月 12 日的大選中大獲全勝，他在議會上提出了一個願景，希望將議會轉變為解決國家最深層次挑戰的中心。立法機構的重新召開被視為穩定這個自前任政府被推翻以來經歷了重大政治動盪的國家的關鍵里程碑。

新議會面臨的最緊迫任務之一是臨時政府時期由諾貝爾獎得主 Muhammad Yunus 頒布的 133 項法令的命運。這些措施涵蓋了從銀行改革、刑法到憲法重組等廣泛領域，於週四正式提交議會。根據憲法，議員們有 30 天的時間批准、修改或否決這些法令，否則它們將失去法律效力。為了應對這一密集的立法任務，政府提議成立一個特別委員會，由財政部和反對派議員組成，以審查改革並決定哪些應該被永久載入法典。[ref:3]

議會的內部領導層也在開幕會議期間確立。Hafiz Uddin Ahmad 和 Kayser Kamal 均為 BNP 成員，分別當選為議長和副議長。BNP 領導的聯盟以 212 個席位佔據了三分之二的多數，為政府提供了顯著的立法優勢。然而，政治格局遠非均勻。反對派由伊斯蘭大會黨領導的聯盟的 Shafiqur Rahman 領導，該聯盟獲得了 76 個席位，並包括由領導 7 月起義的學生領袖們成立的、新成立的國家公民黨（NCP）。[ref:6, 4, 2, 1, 5]

在總統 Mohammed Shahabuddin 的演講中，議會內部的緊張氣氛顯而易見。雖然 BNP 的議員們支持總統的演講，但伊斯蘭大會黨和 NCP 的代表們則舉行了退席抗議。NCP 已特別呼籲彈劾總統，理由是他在前任政府下被任命，儘管為了憲法延續性，他仍繼續任職。這種摩擦凸顯了傳統政治力量與要求更深層次結構性變革、而不僅僅是恢復議會制度的年輕一代活動家之間持續的鬥爭。[ref:5]

經濟上，新政府繼承了一個處於十字路口中的國家。總理 Rahman 強調了振興一個受高通脹和失業率困擾的經濟的必要性，以及全球能源壓力加劇了這一問題。「孟加拉國優先」的外交政策平台也得到了強調，這預示著一種轉向戰略自主和重新調整區域聯盟的趨勢。隨著議會開始工作，重點仍然是這個新的政治秩序能否有效平衡對 2024 年起義烈士伸張正義的要求，以及管理一個擁有 1.7 億人口的國家的實際治理需求。[ref:2]

timeline.title: Bangladesh’s 13th Parliament Convenes as Tarique Rahman Leads New Era of Democratic Reform
timeline.title_zh: 孟加拉國第13屆國會召開，塔里克·拉赫曼領導民主改革新時代
timeline.sub_title: Marking the end of a long transitional period following the 2024 civil uprising, the newly elected Jatiya Sangsad begins its first session to ratify structural reforms and stabilize the nation.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 標誌著經歷2024年內亂後的漫長過渡期結束，新選出的國民議會（Jatiya Sangsad）召開首次會議，以批准結構性改革和穩定國家。
timeline.summary:
Bangladesh reached a significant milestone in its political transition on Thursday, March 12, 2026, as the 13th National Parliament (Jatiya Sangsad) convened for its inaugural session. This opening marks the formal conclusion of the interim administration led by Nobel laureate Muhammad Yunus, which had governed the country since the August 2024 uprising that ended the 16-year rule of former Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina. The newly elected legislature, dominated by the Bangladesh Nationalist Party (BNP), is tasked with establishing a new political order following a landslide victory in the February 12 general elections.

The session began with the election of Hafiz Uddin Ahmad as the Speaker and Kayser Kamal as the Deputy Speaker, both senior members of the BNP. Prime Minister Tarique Rahman, who returned to lead the government after years in exile, delivered a welcoming address emphasizing unity and the restoration of democratic norms. Rahman described the day as a triumph for the people's will, pledging to make parliament the center of all national debates aimed at resolving the country's persistent economic and social challenges. The BNP-led alliance secured a commanding two-thirds majority in the recent polls, while the opposition, led by a coalition including Jamaat-e-Islami and the student-founded National Citizen Party (NCP), took their seats amid a unique constitutional framework.

A central focus of the first day’s proceedings was the formal tabling of 133 ordinances promulgated during the 18-month tenure of the Yunus-led interim government. Law, Justice and Parliamentary Affairs Minister Md Asaduzzaman presented these measures, which cover a wide range of institutional reforms—from banking and policing to electoral law. Under constitutional [ref:3] requirements, the new parliament must ratify, amend, or reject these ordinances within 30 days. This legislative [ref:3] backlog represents the foundation of the structural changes demanded by the student-led movement of 2024, including the reintroduction of the caretaker government system for future elections.

However, the session also highlighted emerging institutional friction regarding the implementation of the "July Charter." This reform blueprint, endorsed by a majority of voters in a concurrent referendum held last month, proposes a shift to a bicameral legislature and the creation of an upper house. A constitutional dilemma has emerged as opposition lawmakers took a dual oath—swearing in both as parliamentarians and as members of a proposed Constitution Reform Council. In contrast, the [ref:8, 4, 1] ruling BNP members took only the standard parliamentary oath, raising questions about the legal mechanism for enacting the Charter’s more radical proposals within the existing 180-day mandate.

As the new government takes charge, it faces immediate pressure to address a sluggish economy characterized by high inflation and energy scarcity. While the parliamentary building, heavily damaged during the 2024 uprising, has been fully restored, the political environment remains deeply polarized. The absence of the Awami [ref:7] League, which was banned from contesting the election, continues to be a point of debate regarding the inclusivity of the new order. Despite these challenges, the peaceful commencement of the 13th Parliament provides a glimmer of stability for a nation striving to leave behind a legacy of autocratic dominance and institutional decay.
timeline.summary_zh:
孟加拉國於2026年3月12日星期四，第13屆國民議會（Jatiya Sangsad）召開首次會議，在政治過渡中達到一個重要的里程碑。這次會議標誌著諾貝爾獎得主穆罕默德·尤努斯領導的臨時政府正式結束，該政府自2024年8月的起義結束前總理謝赫·哈西納16年統治以來一直治理該國。由孟加拉國民族主義黨（BNP）主導的新選出的立法機構，在2月12日的壓倒性勝利後，負責建立新的政治秩序。

會議開始時，選舉了哈菲茲·烏丁·艾哈邁德為議長，凱瑟·卡馬爾為副議長，他們都是BNP的高級成員。總理塔里克·拉赫曼在流亡多年後回國領導政府，發表了歡迎致辭，強調團 unity and the restoration of democratic norms. 拉赫曼將這一天描述為人民意志的勝利，並承諾將議會作為所有國家辯論的中心，旨在解決該國持續存在的經濟和社會挑戰。BNP領導的聯盟在最近的選舉中贏得了三分之二的絕對多數席位，而反對派，由包括伊斯蘭大會黨和學生創立的國民公民黨（NCP）在內的一個聯盟領導，則在獨特的憲法框架下入座。

第一天議程的一個中心焦點是正式提交尤努斯領導的臨時政府18個月任期內頒布的133項法令。法律、司法和議會事務部長Md Asaduzzaman 提出了這些措施，涵蓋了從銀行、警務到選舉法的廣泛機構改革。根據憲法要求，新議會必須在30天內批准、修訂或否決這些法令。這些立法積壓代表了2024年學生領導的運動所要求的結構性變化的基礎，包括為未來選舉重新引入看守政府制度。[ref:3]

然而，會議也凸顯了在實施「七月憲章」方面新出現的機構摩擦。這項改革藍圖在上個月舉行的同步公投中獲得了大多數選民的支持，提議轉向兩院制議會並設立參議院。隨著反對派議員宣誓就任議員並成為擬議憲法改革委員會成員，出現了憲法困境。相反，執政的BNP議員僅接受了標準的議會宣誓，這對在現有的180天任期內執行憲章更激進提案的法律機制提出了疑問。[ref:8, 4, 1]

隨著新政府上任，它面臨著解決經濟增長緩慢、高通脹和能源短缺的嚴峻壓力。儘管在2024年起義期間嚴重受損的議會大樓已完全修復，但政治環境仍然高度兩極化。未能參選的孟加拉國人民聯盟的缺席，繼續是關於新秩序包容性的爭論點。儘管存在這些挑戰，第13屆議會的和平召開為一個努力擺脫專制統治和制度衰敗遺留的國家帶來了一線穩定。[ref:7]

新議會面臨的最緊迫任務之一是臨時政府時期由諾貝爾獎得主 Muhammad Yunus 頒布的 133 項法令的命運。這些措施涵蓋了從銀行改革、刑法到憲法重組等廣泛領域，於週四正式提交議會。根據憲法，議員們有 30 天的時間批准、修改或否決這些法令，否則它們將失去法律效力。為了應對這一密集的立法任務，政府提議成立一個特別委員會，由財政部和反對派議員組成，以審查改革並決定哪些應該被永久載入法典。[ref:3]

議會的內部領導層也在開幕會議期間確立。Hafiz Uddin Ahmad 和 Kayser Kamal 均為 BNP 成員，分別當選為議長和副議長。BNP 領導的聯盟以 212 個席位佔據了三分之二的多數，為政府提供了顯著的立法優勢。然而，政治格局遠非均勻。反對派由伊斯蘭大會黨領導的聯盟的 Shafiqur Rahman 領導，該聯盟獲得了 76 個席位，並包括由領導 7 月起義的學生領袖們成立的、新成立的國家公民黨（NCP）。[ref:6, 4, 2, 1, 5]

在總統 Mohammed Shahabuddin 的演講中，議會內部的緊張氣氛顯而易見。雖然 BNP 的議員們支持總統的演講，但伊斯蘭大會黨和 NCP 的代表們則舉行了退席抗議。NCP 已特別呼籲彈劾總統，理由是他在前任政府下被任命，儘管為了憲法延續性，他仍繼續任職。這種摩擦凸顯了傳統政治力量與要求更深層次結構性變革、而不僅僅是恢復議會制度的年輕一代活動家之間持續的鬥爭。[ref:5]

經濟上，新政府繼承了一個處於十字路口中的國家。總理 Rahman 強調了振興一個受高通脹和失業率困擾的經濟的必要性，以及全球能源壓力加劇了這一問題。「孟加拉國優先」的外交政策平台也得到了強調，這預示著一種轉向戰略自主和重新調整區域聯盟的趨勢。隨著議會開始工作，重點仍然是這個新的政治秩序能否有效平衡對 2024 年起義烈士伸張正義的要求，以及管理一個擁有 1.7 億人口的國家的實際治理需求。[ref:2]

stories.label: Major banks set to receive first stablecoin issuance licenses in Hong Kong
stories.label_zh: 主要銀行將獲發香港首批穩定幣發行牌照

timeline.title: HSBC and Standard Chartered Expected to Secure Hong Kong’s First Regulated Stablecoin Issuance Licenses
timeline.title_zh: 滙豐和渣打預計將獲得香港首批受規管的穩定幣發行牌照
timeline.sub_title: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority is reportedly prioritizing note-issuing banks to spearhead its new regulatory framework, aiming to establish a high-compliance foundation for the city’s digital asset ecosystem.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 香港金融管理局據報將優先考慮發鈔銀行，以推動其新的監管框架，旨在為本港的數碼資產生態系統建立高合規的基礎。
timeline.summary:
Hong Kong is positioned to reach a defining milestone in its digital asset evolution as reports emerge that HSBC and a joint venture led by Standard Chartered are the frontrunners to receive the city's first stablecoin issuer licenses. According to sources familiar with the matter, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority is preparing to grant these landmark approvals within the next two weeks, with a potential announcement date targeted for March 24. This [ref:9, 7] move follows a rigorous assessment of dozens of applications submitted under the territory’s new Stablecoins Ordinance, which officially took effect last August.

The anticipated selection of these specific institutions reflects a deliberate regulatory strategy to prioritize established, note-issuing banks. By placing [ref:7, 3, 1] well-capitalized incumbents at the center of the stablecoin market, regulators aim to leverage existing compliance frameworks and strong capital reserves to ensure financial stability. This "stricter [ref:5, 10] before looser" approach is designed to foster institutional and retail trust in tokenized payments, contrasting with the more volatile nature of the broader cryptocurrency market. Financial Secretary Paul Chan previously indicated that only a small number of licenses—likely three or four—would be issued in this inaugural batch to maintain tight oversight during the early stages of adoption.

Standard Chartered is expected to receive its license through a joint venture formed with Animoca Brands and Hong Kong Telecommunications. This entity has been a prominent participant in the HKMA’s stablecoin issuer sandbox since 2024, testing use cases such as e-commerce payments and cross-border trade settlements. In contrast, the potential [ref:7] approval of HSBC has come as a surprise to some industry observers, as the bank did not participate in the official sandbox program. However, its status [ref:7] as Hong Kong’s largest bank and its extensive experience with tokenized deposits and blockchain-based trade finance reportedly strengthened its application in the eyes of the regulator.

The licensing regime requires all fiat-referenced stablecoin issuers to meet stringent requirements, including 100% reserve backing in high-quality liquid assets and the ability to offer par redemptions within one business day. These standards are nearly identical to traditional banking regulations, signaling Hong Kong’s intent to integrate blockchain technology into its core financial infrastructure. While the HKMA has declined [ref:4] to comment on specific market rumors, the impending approvals are viewed as a critical step in the city’s bid to become a global hub for digital assets and tokenization. This progress arrives as neighboring mainland China continues to maintain a strict stance against onshore real-world asset tokenization, further widening the regulatory gap and positioning Hong Kong as a unique gateway for compliant digital finance in Asia.
timeline.summary_zh:
隨著消息傳出，滙豐銀行及由渣打銀行牽頭的合資企業將領取本港首批穩定幣發行牌照，香港有望在其數碼資產演進中達到一個決定性的里程碑。據知情人士透露，香港金融管理局正準備在未來兩週內授予這些標誌性的批准，預計宣布日期為 3 月 24 日。此舉是在對該地區新《穩定幣條例》（去年 8 月正式生效）進行了嚴格評估後作出的，該條例收到了數十份申請。[ref:9, 7]

這些特定機構的預計選擇反映了一項審慎的監管策略，即優先考慮成熟、發鈔的銀行。透過將資本雄厚的現有銀行置於穩定幣市場的中心，監管機構旨在利用現有的合規框架和雄厚的資本儲備來確保金融穩定。這種「先嚴後寬」的做法旨在培養機構和零售客戶對代幣化支付的信任，與更廣泛的加密貨幣市場的波動性形成對比。財政司司長陳茂波先前曾指出，在首批發放的牌照中，可能只會發放三到四個牌照，以在早期採用階段保持嚴格的監管。[ref:7, 3, 1, 5, 10]

渣打銀行預計將透過與 Animoca Brands 和香港電訊組成的合資企業獲得其牌照。該實體自 2024 年以來一直是香港金管局穩定幣發行沙盒計劃的活躍參與者，測試了電子商務支付和跨境貿易結算等用例。相比之下，滙豐銀行的潛在批准讓一些業內觀察人士感到意外，因為該銀行沒有參加官方沙盒計劃。然而，據稱其作為香港最大銀行的地位以及在代幣化存款和基於區塊鏈的貿易融資方面的豐富經驗，在監管機構眼中加強了其申請。[ref:7]

牌照制度要求所有法幣掛鈎的穩定幣發行商滿足嚴格的要求，包括持有高質量流動資產的 100% 儲備支持，並能在一個工作日內以面值贖回。這些標準與傳統銀行監管幾乎相同，表明香港有意將區塊鏈技術整合到其核心金融基礎設施中。雖然金管局拒絕評論具體市場傳言，但即將到來的批准被視為該市爭取成為數碼資產和代幣化全球中心的關鍵一步。這一進展發生之際，鄰近的中國內地繼續對境內真實資產代幣化採取嚴格立場，進一步擴大了監管差距，並將香港定位為亞洲合規數碼金融的獨特門戶。[ref:4]

timeline.title: Major Banks HSBC and Standard Chartered Poised to Secure Hong Kong’s First Regulated Stablecoin Licenses
timeline.title_zh: 主要銀行匯豐及渣打銀行有望獲得香港首批受規管穩定幣牌照
timeline.sub_title: Following a rigorous review of dozens of applicants, Hong Kong regulators are reportedly preparing to issue inaugural licenses to prominent financial institutions, signaling a shift toward institutional digital assets.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 在嚴格審查數十家申請者後，香港監管機構據報正準備向知名金融機構發放首批牌照，標誌著機構數字資產的轉向。
timeline.summary:
Hong Kong is on the verge of a significant milestone in its digital asset journey, with reports emerging on March 12, 2026, that the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) is prepared to grant its first batch of stablecoin issuance licenses. Sources familiar with the matter indicate that the inaugural approvals are expected to be announced as early as next week, with March 24 cited as a potential target date. The [ref:6] shortlist for this landmark regulatory move reportedly features global banking giants HSBC and Standard Chartered, alongside the Hong Kong-based virtual asset trading platform OSL. This [ref:4] development follows a period of intense scrutiny by the HKMA, which narrowed down a field of approximately 36 formal applications to a select group of institutional frontrunners.

The inclusion of HSBC is particularly notable among industry analysts. Unlike many other applicants, HSBC did not participate in the HKMA’s stablecoin issuer sandbox launched last year. However, the bank has been deeply integrated into the city's broader tokenization ecosystem, participating in "Project Ensemble"—a wholesale central bank digital currency (CBDC) pilot—and launching retail-facing products like the HSBC Gold Token. Standard Chartered [ref:7], by contrast, has pursued the license through a high-profile joint venture involving Animoca Brands and HKT, having been an active participant in the regulatory sandbox. The selection of these established financial institutions underscores the HKMA’s "stricter before looser" philosophy, prioritizing entities with robust compliance frameworks and significant capital reserves to ensure market stability.

Under the regulatory framework established by the Stablecoin Ordinance that took effect in August 2025, licensed issuers must adhere to stringent bank-grade requirements. These include maintaining a minimum paid-up share capital of HK$25 million and ensuring that all stablecoins are 100% backed by high-quality liquid assets held in trust. Furthermore, issuers [ref:2] must guarantee the redemption of tokens at par value within one business day. By focusing the first [ref:2] batch on note-issuing banks and regulated platforms, Hong Kong aims to mitigate the risks of "digital dollarization"—the potential for the digital economy to be dominated by unregulated, foreign-denominated tokens—while promoting a regulated, Hong Kong dollar-pegged alternative for local and cross-border trade.

While the market originally expected a slightly larger initial cohort, recent reports suggest the HKMA has opted for a more cautious rollout. Some previously discussed [ref:7, 3] candidates, including RD Technologies and certain mainland Chinese payment providers, were reportedly excluded from this first round. This selectivity is seen as [ref:1] a strategic move to establish a credible and secure foundation for the city's digital currency architecture. Financial Secretary Paul Chan had previously hinted at this timeline during his 2026-27 budget speech, emphasizing that the government would facilitate licensed issuers to explore various application scenarios, such as real-time corporate treasury management and the settlement of tokenized bonds. As the March 24 window approaches, the financial sector anticipates that these licenses will finally bridge the gap between traditional banking infrastructure and the programmable future of decentralized finance in Asia.
timeline.summary_zh:
根據3月12日傳出的消息，香港即將迎來數字資產領域的一個重要里程碑，香港金融管理局（HKMA）已準備好頒發其首批穩定幣發行牌照。知情人士透露，首批批准預計最早下周公布，並可能在3月24日。據報道，入圍這項里程碑式監管行動名單的包括全球銀行巨頭匯豐銀行（HSBC）和渣打銀行（Standard Chartered），以及香港虛擬資產交易平台OSL。此舉是香港金管局經過對約36份正式申請進行嚴格篩選後，選定了一批機構領跑者的結果。[ref:6, 4]

匯豐銀行在此次入圍名單中尤為引人注目。與許多其他申請者不同，匯豐並未參與金管局去年啟動的穩定幣發行人監管沙盒。然而，該銀行已深度融入本港的代幣化生態系統，參與了批發央行數字貨幣（CBDC）試點「Project Ensemble」，並推出了如匯豐黃金代幣等零售產品。相比之下，渣打銀行通過與Animoca Brands和HKT組成的知名合資企業申請牌照，並且一直是監管沙盒的積極參與者。這些知名金融機構的入選，凸顯了金管局「審慎監管、循序漸進」的策略，優先考慮擁有健全合規框架和充足資本儲備的機構，以確保市場穩定。[ref:7]

根據2025年8月生效的《穩定幣條例》設立的監管框架，持牌發行人必須遵守嚴格的銀行級要求。這包括維持最低實繳股本2500萬港元，並確保所有穩定幣100%由信託持有的高質量流動資產支持。此外，發行人必須保證代幣按面值在一個工作日內兌換。通過將首批牌照集中發放給發鈔銀行和受監管平台，香港旨在減輕「數字美元化」的風險，即數字經濟可能被未經監管的、以美元計價的代幣主導，同時推廣一種受監管、與港元掛鉤的替代方案，用於本地和跨境貿易。[ref:2]

儘管市場最初預期會有更多機構獲得牌照，但最新報道顯示，香港金管局選擇了更為謹慎的發牌方式。據報，RD Technologies和一些中國內地支付供應商等先前討論過的候選機構，未能進入首輪。這種選擇性被視為建立香港數字貨幣架構可信且安全基礎的戰略舉措。財政司司長陳茂波在2026-27年度財政預算案演講中曾暗示過這一時間表，強調政府將協助持牌發行人探索各種應用場景，如實時企業財資管理和代幣化債券的結算。隨著3月24日的臨近，金融界預計這些牌照將最終彌合傳統銀行基礎設施與亞洲去中心化金融可編程未來之間的差距。[ref:7, 3, 1]

stories.label: Generative Engine Optimization replaces search engine optimization as primary focus for developers
stories.label_zh: 生成引擎優化取代搜尋引擎優化，成為開發者首要焦點

timeline.title: Developers Pivot to Generative Engine Optimization as AI Citations Surpass Traditional Search Engine Rankings
timeline.title_zh: 開發者轉向生成式引擎優化，AI 引用量超越傳統搜尋引擎排名
timeline.sub_title: As traditional search volume declines by 25 percent, the digital landscape has pivoted toward answer engines, forcing developers to master generative engine optimization to maintain visibility within AI-synthesized responses.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 隨著傳統搜尋量下降 25%，數碼領域轉向答案引擎，迫使開發者掌握生成式引擎優化，以維持在 AI 綜合回應中的可見度。
timeline.summary:
The digital marketing landscape has reached a definitive turning point this week as the transition from Search Engine Optimization to Generative Engine Optimization officially became the primary focus for global developers and brands. On March 13, 2026, industry reports confirmed that the era of 'ten blue links' has been largely superseded by conversational AI interfaces, with platforms like ChatGPT, Google Gemini, and Perplexity now handling the majority of complex user queries. [ref:10] This shift is driven by a massive decline in traditional search clicks, with current data showing that approximately 60 percent of Google searches now end without a visit to an external website.

Two major technological launches today have solidified this transition. Synscribe [ref:7], an AI-driven startup, announced a multi-tenant GEO agent built on the open-source OpenClaw framework. This [ref:3] tool is designed to autonomously execute keyword research, landing page creation, and link building specifically for generative engines, claiming to reduce manual optimization workloads by over 90 percent. Simultaneously [ref:3], Focus Technology unveiled VisiGEO, a SaaS platform that allows companies to analyze their brand’s 'share of voice' and citation frequency across major large language models. These developments highlight a move away from technical keyword stuffing toward a strategy focused on semantic authority and AI-readable structured data.

Market analysis published in the last 24 hours projects the global GEO market will exceed $1.4 billion by the end of 2026, growing at an annual rate of over 40 percent. This growth is accelerated by a predicted 25 percent drop in traditional search volume as users form loyalties to specific AI 'answer engines.' For developers [ref:11], the technical requirements have shifted toward implementing robust JSON-LD structured data and ensuring brand consistency across various digital touchpoints. The goal [ref:8] is no longer just to rank first on a results page, but to be the primary source cited within an AI’s generated summary. Experts [ref:2, 1, 6, 9, 11, 13, 12, 5] note that being cited as a source inside an AI Overview can improve organic click-through rates by a small but critical margin compared to being omitted entirely.

Industry researchers also updated their algorithm breakdowns for the 'Big Six' global LLMs today, noting that AI systems now prioritize authoritative third-party sources and 'human-first' content over brand-owned marketing copy. This focus on E-E-A-T—Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness—has forced a reimagining of content workflows. Developers are [ref:5] increasingly adopting the 'llms.txt' standard to provide machine-friendly summaries for AI ingestion, while also deploying Retrieval-Augmented Generation optimization to ensure that AI agents find the most up-to-date brand information. As 2026 progresses [ref:4], the ability to maintain a stable and high-quality citation rate in AI responses is becoming the new gold standard for digital relevance, marking 2026 as the year the industry moved from search to discovery.
timeline.summary_zh:
本週，隨著從搜尋引擎優化 (SEO) 到生成式引擎優化 (GEO) 的轉變正式成為全球開發者和品牌的首要重點，數碼營銷格局達到了明確的轉折點。2026 年 3 月 13 日，行業報告證實，「十藍連結」時代已被對話式 AI 介面在很大程度上取代，ChatGPT、Google Gemini 和 Perplexity 等平台現已處理絕大多數複雜用戶查詢。這一轉變是由傳統搜尋點擊量的大幅下降推動的，目前數據顯示，約 60% 的 Google 搜尋最終沒有訪問外部網站。[ref:10]

今天發布的兩項重大技術發布鞏固了這一轉變。AI 驅動的初創公司 Synscribe 宣布推出基於開源 OpenClaw 框架的多租戶 GEO 代理。該工具旨在為生成式引擎自動執行關鍵字研究、登陸頁創建和連結建設，聲稱可減少手動優化工作量超過 90%。同時，Focus Technology 發布了 VisiGEO，這是一個 SaaS 平台，允許公司分析其品牌在各大語言模型中的「聲音份額」和引用頻率。這些發展突顯了行業正在從技術性的關鍵字堆砌轉向一種側重於語義權威和 AI 可讀結構化數據的策略。[ref:7, 3]

過去 24 小時發布的市場分析預計，全球 GEO 市場將在 2026 年底前超過 14 億美元，年增長率超過 40%。隨著用戶對特定 AI「答案引擎」形成忠誠度，預計傳統搜尋量將下降 25%，這加速了這一增長。對開發者而言，技術要求已轉向實施穩健的 JSON-LD 結構化數據，並確保品牌在各種數碼接觸點的一致性。目標不再僅僅是排名第一，而是成為 AI 生成摘要中的主要引用來源。專家指出，被引用為 AI 總覽中的來源，與完全被省略相比，可以提高有機點擊率，儘管幅度較小但至關重要。[ref:11, 8, 2, 1, 6, 9, 13, 12, 5]

行業研究人員今天還更新了「六大」全球 LLM 的演算法細節，指出 AI 系統現在優先考慮權威的第三方來源和「以人為本」的內容，而非品牌自有營銷文案。這種對 E-E-A-T—體驗、專業知識、權威性和可信度—的關注，迫使內容工作流程進行重新構想。開發者越來越多地採用「llms.txt」標準，為 AI 攝取提供機器友好的摘要，同時還部署檢索增強生成優化，以確保 AI 代理找到最新的品牌資訊。隨著 2026 年的推進，在 AI 回應中維持穩定且高質素的引用率，正成為數碼相關性的新黃金標準，標誌著 2026 年為行業從搜尋轉向發現的一年。[ref:5, 4]

timeline.title: Generative Engine Optimization Overtakes SEO as Primary Developer Focus Following Landmark AI Brand Visibility Report
timeline.title_zh: 生成式引擎優化超越搜索引擎優化，成為人工智能品牌可見性報告發布後的開發者首要關注點
timeline.sub_title: Industry data for March 2026 reveals a critical tipping point as zero-click searches dominate and major brands pivot budgets toward AI citation and answer-engine visibility.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 2026年3月行業數據顯示一個關鍵轉折點，零點擊搜尋佔主導地位，各大品牌將預算轉向人工智能引用和答案引擎可見性。
timeline.summary:
A fundamental shift in digital strategy has reached its zenith this week as Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) officially supplanted traditional Search Engine Optimization (SEO) as the primary focus for developers and marketing technologists. The transition, which has been accelerating throughout early 2026, was solidified by the release of the March 2026 AI Brand Visibility Report. This comprehensive analysis tracked citation patterns across major platforms, including ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity, revealing that the traditional 'blue link' era has effectively ended for a majority of high-intent consumer queries. 

Industry data shows that zero-click searches now account for over 60% of all Google queries, a figure that rises even higher when AI Overviews are triggered. Developers [ref:1] are responding by abandoning legacy keyword-stuffing tactics in favor of 'entity-first' architectures and 'Answer-First' logic. The [ref:4] primary goal is no longer to secure a top-ranked link, but to become the authoritative source that an AI model synthesizes and cites within a single, cohesive response. This 'synthesis over search' model has forced a total rewrite of the developer playbook, with a new emphasis on structured data, semantic clarity, and the establishment of verifiable 'brand signals' that AI models prioritize over traditional backlinks.

Technological adoption has kept pace with this strategic pivot. A new ecosystem of GEO-specific tools, such as Atomic AGI and AthenaHQ, has seen a massive surge in enterprise subscriptions this month. These platforms allow teams to monitor their 'AI share of voice' and identify citation gaps in real-time. Developers [ref:3, 2] are increasingly implementing modular content strategies designed specifically for large language model (LLM) extraction, moving away from long-form unformatted text toward structured blocks and listicles, which now account for nearly 60% of all cited URLs in generative responses.

The economic implications of this shift are profound. Recent agency data indicates that while AI-driven traffic may be lower in raw volume compared to legacy search, it is significantly more valuable, with some reports suggesting AI search traffic is over four times more likely to convert. This 'quality over quantity' reality is driving a massive redistribution of digital marketing budgets. Organizations that fail to adapt to the GEO-first paradigm are finding themselves 'invisible' to the 71% of users who now rely primarily on AI assistants for research and purchasing decisions.

Looking ahead, experts describe a '2026 Brand Divide' emerging between companies that have integrated into the AI knowledge layer and those still competing for dwindling organic clicks. As AI agents become more autonomous in their ability to handle transactions and product recommendations, the discipline of Generative Engine Optimization is expected to evolve even further into 'Agentic Optimization,' where developers focus on making their products and services easily actionable by AI-driven workflows.
timeline.summary_zh:
本週，數字策略發生根本性轉變，生成式引擎優化（GEO）正式取代傳統搜索引擎優化（SEO），成為開發者和營銷技術人員的首要關注點。這一轉變自2026年初以來一直在加速，並隨著2026年3月人工智能品牌可見性報告的發布而鞏固。該報告對ChatGPT、Gemini和Perplexity等主要平台上的引用模式進行了全面追蹤，揭示對於大多數高意向消費者查詢而言，傳統的「藍鏈」時代已基本結束。
行業數據顯示，零點擊搜尋現已佔Google查詢總數的60%以上，當觸發AI概覽時，這一數字甚至更高。開發者們正在放棄傳統的關鍵字堆砌策略，轉而採用「實體優先」架構和「答案優先」邏輯。首要目標不再是爭取一個排名靠前的連結，而是成為AI模型在單一、連貫的回應中綜合和引用的權威來源。「綜合優於搜尋」的模式迫使開發者們徹底重寫遊戲規則，更加重視結構化數據、語義清晰度以及建立AI模型比傳統反向連結更優先考慮的可驗證「品牌信號」。[ref:1, 4]
技術採用與這一策略轉變同步進行。一種新的GEO專用工具生態系統，如Atomic AGI和AthenaHQ，本月企業訂閱量激增。這些平台允許團隊實時監控其「AI聲音份額」並識別引用差距。開發者們越來越多地採用專門為大型語言模型（LLM）提取而設計的模塊化內容策略，從長篇無格式文本轉向結構化區塊和列表，這些現已佔生成回應中引用的URL近60%。[ref:3, 2]
這一轉變的經濟影響是深遠的。最近的機構數據表明，雖然AI驅動的流量原始數量可能低於傳統搜尋，但其價值卻顯著更高，有報告指出AI搜尋流量轉化率可能高出四倍以上。「質量重於數量」的現實正在推動數字營銷預算的巨大重新分配。未能適應GEO優先範式組織的將發現自己對71%主要依賴AI助手進行研究和購買決定的用戶來說變得「隱形」。
展望未來，專家們描述了公司之間出現的「2026品牌鴻溝」，這些公司已整合到AI知識層中，而另一些公司仍在爭奪日益減少的自然點擊量。隨著AI代理在處理交易和產品推薦方面的自主性越來越強，生成式引擎優化這一學科預計將進一步演變為「代理優化」，開發者將專注於使他們的產品和服務易於被AI驅動的工作流程所操作。

stories.title: Developers Pivot to Generative Engine Optimization as AI Citations Surpass Traditional Search Engine Rankings
stories.title_zh: 開發者轉向生成式引擎優化，AI 引用量超越傳統搜尋引擎排名
stories.sub_title: As traditional search volume declines by 25 percent, the digital landscape has pivoted toward answer engines, forcing developers to master generative engine optimization to maintain visibility within AI-synthesized responses.
stories.sub_title_zh: 隨著傳統搜尋量下降 25%，數碼領域轉向答案引擎，迫使開發者掌握生成式引擎優化，以維持在 AI 綜合回應中的可見度。

[ref:10] This shift is driven by a massive decline in traditional search clicks, with current data showing that approximately 60 percent of Google searches now end without a visit to an external website.
